tc.name: 大廚老陳
tc.short_description: 《大廚老陳》是一款適合1到4名玩家同樂的多人合作狩獵料理遊戲。老陳與他的夥伴們開的餐廳面臨資金嚴重不足的狀態，只有去參加高風險的料理比賽，才有機會快速獲得一大筆收入。作為一個老陳帶領的優秀料理團隊，你和你的夥伴們為了這筆高額的獎金決定奮力一搏，加入這場充滿奇幻色彩的異世界料理比賽。 把隔熱手套當拳套使用的大廚老陳；認為兩把武士刀不嫌多的武士柴犬巴西利；用腳射箭精準無比的弓手喜鵲貝伊，還有無辜萌萌大眼但戰鬥中異常兇殘的法師貓佩帕，為了餐廳的裝潢費用，4人一同前往異世界面對挑戰！

en.name: 傲剑情缘
en.short_description: 纷纷江湖路，萧萧武侠情。有人的地方就有江湖。我辈人才倍出，在江湖上呈现出了新的一场百家争鸣、八仙过海各显神通的精彩竞争。《傲剑情缘》是一款全新的以武侠江湖题材背景的RPG游戏。 精美的人物刻画、丰富真实的江湖场景、热血刺激的打斗渲染，给你身临其境的直观游戏感受。天纵英才群侠出，铁血豪情论英雄。这里有上百个极具特色、风格迥异的武侠等待你的召唤，与你一起结伴而行，共闯天涯路。
developers: 上海奇速网络科技有限公司

en.name: Tetrobot and Co.
en.short_description: Tetrobot is the world's most popular and reliable robot, but he's not perfect. That's why I, Maya, have built him a microscopic little brother, Psychobot.Help me guide Psy through Tetrobot's cogs and circuits: by swallowing blocks of matter and spitting them out, we can repair anything.

tc.name: Tetrobot and Co.
tc.short_description: Tetrobot 是世界上最受歡迎、最可靠的機器人，但他並不完美。這就是為什麼，我 - Maya，為他打造了一個迷你小兄弟 - Psychobot。幫我引導 Psy 通過 Tetrobot 內部的齒輪和電路吧：藉由吞下方塊物質並將它們吐出的方式，我們可以修理任何事物。你必須了解輸送管、雷射、風扇以及其他電子裝置是如何運作，學習如何改變史萊姆的化學屬性並收集你在過程中所發現的記憶方塊。世界各地的 Tetrobot 擁有者只能依靠我們，因為只有我們能夠修復他們珍貴的機器人。喜歡動腦的玩家不能錯過的純解謎遊戲。超過 50 個關卡以及許多秘密等著您來解開。

en.name: 3SwitcheD
en.short_description: Be careful! This Game is addictive! You won´t find more challenges, more speed, more fun and more treasures anywhere in the known Universe!3SwitcheD™ combines classical Gameplay with fascinating new technologies. Find yourself in a new World arcade gaming.

tc.name: 3SwitcheD
tc.short_description: 小心！這遊戲會令人上癮！等著你的，是全宇宙最爽、最快、最刺激、最具挑戰性的遊戲體驗！3SwitcheD™ 融合了經典遊戲模式和最新技術，利用最新的 3D 和 3D-ET 技術，將遊戲帶進了全新領域。 3D-ET™ 技術不單令遊戲的畫面疑幻疑真，更將你變成遊戲的一部分！配合視象鏡頭，你只需動一動頭和眼睛，遊戲就會隨之而即時調整視角，給你從未想像過的遊戲體驗！遊遊戲本身的內容亦紮實精彩，等著你的挑戰！你準備好了嗎？遊戲玩法隨你所好，挑戰六種遊戲模式，爭取最高得分！「一觸即發」模式將挑戰你的智慧和技巧！想體驗極速快感？那「移形換影」模式就最適合你！沒有最快，只有更快！「天翻地覆」模式則完全顛覆遊戲的常規，重新考驗你的技術！

en.name: 虫鸣
en.short_description: 崇明接到了上级的安排，去往雾谷村进行旅游景点调查采访，听闻村子内存在着“养蛊辟邪祟”的习俗，每户人家或多或少都懂得一些蛊术， 但这些蛊术从何而来的却无从得知... 夜晚的大山深处，处处响起虫鸣... 起雾了 --------------------------------- 感谢同学们的支持，目前评论中反映到的bug我们正在积极修复，抱歉给大伙儿带来不好的游戏体验，近期我们也会添加键盘操作，以及对其它方面的优化更新，开发不易555555，希望不要因为这一问题带来差评，谢谢！
developers: 深圳市创源互娱科技有限公司

en.name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Into the Pit
en.short_description: Survive five nights of terror in this chilling adventure game. Travel between time periods to solve puzzles, gather clues, and outrun the threat relentlessly pursuing you. Move swiftly and stay hidden, and you may just survive. But be careful—it's not just your own life that’s on the line this time.

en.short_description: A narrative-driven puzzle adventure game with the butterfly effect at its core. Board the Babel, a mysterious cruise ship that takes you on a whimsical journey to the afterlife. Use a special pen to help fellow travelers fulfill their wishes by rewriting the past, changing how the future unfolds.

tc.name: 巴別號漫遊指南
tc.short_description: 一款以蝴蝶效應為核心的劇情冒險遊戲。你將登上名為巴別號的奇幻巨輪，經歷一段光怪陸離的轉世之旅……旅人的心願與遺憾在此交織，而你，準備好拿起鋼筆，去改寫他們經歷的一切了嗎？

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
en.short_description: With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new...

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
tc.short_description: Sid Meier 的 Civilization (文明帝國) 系列在全球已售出逾六百萬套，並獲各地支持者與媒體好評，被視為是史上最經典的電腦遊戲系列之一。 現在，Sid Meier 與 Firaxis Games 更把這一款引人入迷的有趣遊戲帶往另一高峰，加入新的遊戲方式，新的勝敗條件，新的工具來管理擴張您的文明，並用全新的方法，讓自訂遊戲更簡單，多人模式更有趣，選項更多。 Civilization IV 有細緻的畫面，彷彿活著的 3D 世界，把遊戲體驗提升至全新的境界。 Civilization IV 已受玩家讚為 2005 年十大遊戲，是全球玩家都一定要擁有的遊戲！

en.name: Eldritch
en.short_description: Eldritch is the original imsim roguelike: a first-person action game inspired by roguelikes, immersive sims, and H. P. Lovecraft.

tc.name: Eldritch

en.name: Zengeon

en.name: ULTIMATE MARVEL VS. CAPCOM 3

en.name: Missing Translation
en.short_description: Lost in a weird city in the middle of the desert and surrounded by strange creatures that keep staring at you. This is a game about exploring the unknown and solving puzzles... lots of them! Don't be fooled by the looks, this isn't a point & click adventure.

en.name: Heroes of the Three Kingdoms
en.short_description: 《三国群英传》是由宇峻奥汀（Odin）公司出品的一款策略战棋游戏，也是三国群英传系列的第一部作品 ，于1998年发布。 游戏按即时制展开，双方行动和交战同时进行。游戏进行的大致流程是“内政经营模式”到“大地战略模式”，然后到“战争发生”，再循环到“内政经营模式”。

tc.name: 三國群英傳

Accompany young Edna and her talking stuffed bunny Harvey on a whacky attempt to escape from her padded cell. Experience a bizarre journey all across the insane asylum and far beyond its brick walls.

You must navigate through the perilous environment and fight off blood-thirsty creatures to save your crewmates and escape with your lives!

en.name: Lovers in a Dangerous Spacetime
en.short_description: Explore a neon galaxy in your very own battleship in this 1- to 4-player couch co-op adventure.

tc.name: Lovers in a Dangerous Spacetime
tc.short_description: “爱的使者在危险时空”，激烈火爆。1 至 4 名玩家，置身巨型霓虹太空战舰中，训练太空射击协作。只有协同作战，你才能战胜反爱的邪恶力量，解救被绑架的太空兔，躲避真空死亡陷阱。

en.name: September 7th
en.short_description: "September 7th" is a short horror game released for Christmas. The plot of the game is simple to the point of banality, and the gameplay is not delayed.The game also contains some Easter eggs and mentions. The game takes place in 2009.

tc.name: September 7th
tc.short_description: "September 7th" is a short horror game released for Christmas. The plot of the game is simple to the point of banality, and the gameplay is not delayed.The game also contains some Easter eggs and mentions. The game takes place in 2009.

en.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
en.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

tc.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
tc.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

en.name: Ring of Pain
en.short_description: Enter the Ring of Pain, a roguelike card crawler where encounters come to you. Each step around the ring a dire decision. Go for the loot or backstab a creeping horror? Meet strange friends bearing gifts and treasure. Choose your gear wisely to survive and discover the secrets of the Ring of Pain.

tc.name: 苦痛之環 Ring of Pain
tc.short_description: 《苦痛之環》為Roguelike探索類卡牌遊戲，踏上意想不到的旅程，與各式各樣的事物相遇。在這個環形世界裡，你必須格外謹慎，踏錯一步就有可能走上絕路。你會選擇搜刮財寶，還是去偷襲駭人的怪物？

en.name: Ratropolis
en.short_description: A fusion of roguelite, tower defense, city-building, and deck-building! We created a new kind of real time strategy game filled with addictive and fast-paced gameplay. Create your deck, defend your city, and build the largest Ratropolis in history!

tc.name: Ratropolis
tc.short_description: 鼠之城邦是壹款使用卡牌來保衛城市，防禦敵人攻擊的遊戲。特別的是，遊戲具有即時戰略的特性，所以為了防禦即將到來的敵人，需要快速的判斷力和爆發力。通過遊戲獲得並使用卡牌來建設您的鼠之城邦吧!

en.name: Of Guards And Thieves
en.short_description: Of Guards and Thieves is a multiplayer stealth game in which high-powered guards face off against fast and elusive thieves in a contest of wits. Outsmarting the enemy and shooting your way through to the goal are equally valid strategies. Simple rules, emergent gameplay and high replayability.

tc.name: Of Guards And Thieves
tc.short_description: Of Guards and Thieves是一款多人隱形遊戲，其中高水平的後衛在斗智斗勇中與快速而難以捉摸的盜賊對峙。同樣，有效的策略是使敵人勝過對手並向目標射擊。 Of Guards and Thieves是一款具有簡單規則，突顯遊戲玩法和高重玩性的遊戲，一定會成為您遊戲系列中的佼佼者！

en.name: ENDLESS™ Dungeon - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: ENDLESS™ Dungeon is a Rogue-lite Tactical Action game, set in the award-winning ENDLESS™ Universe. Recruit a team of shipwrecked heroes, plunge into a long-abandoned space station, and protect your crystal against never-ending waves of monsters… or die trying, get reloaded, and try again.

tc.name: 《ENDLESS™ Dungeon終極版》
tc.short_description: 《ENDLESS™ Dungeon》是一款融合了隨機地城、戰術動作以及塔防類型的獨特遊戲，背景設定在曾榮獲大獎的ENDLESS™宇宙。單槍匹馬，或在合作模式中與朋友一同潛入一座荒廢已久的空間站，招募一隊在船難中幸存下的英雄，保護你的水晶不被一波又一波的怪物給毀掉。

en.name: Valley
en.short_description: Explore the vast and beautiful world of Valley using the power of the L.E.A.F. suit: a fierce exoskeleton that grants exceptional speed and agility along with the phenomenal ability to manipulate the life and death of all living things.

tc.name: Valley
tc.short_description: Explore the vast and beautiful world of Valley using the power of the L.E.A.F. suit: a fierce exoskeleton that grants exceptional speed and agility along with the phenomenal ability to manipulate the life and death of all living things.

en.name: Foregone
en.short_description: Foregone is a fast and fluid 2D action-platformer packed with legendary loot and stunning pixel art. Collect an arsenal of powerful weapons and unravel a compelling story of regret and conspiracy as you slice your way through hordes of enemies to save Calagan.

tc.name: 放棄
tc.short_description: 《Foregone》是一款流暢快節奏的 2D 動作平台遊戲，充滿了傳奇的戰利品和絢麗的像素美術。收集琳琅满目的強大武器，揭開充滿遺憾與陰謀的精彩故事，一路打敗成群的敵人以拯救卡拉甘。

en.name: Gal*Gun 2
en.short_description: Notoriously lewd first-person shooter, where you find yourself irresistible to every girl in school! Fend off their advances as you explore the school grounds. Use gadgets to expel mischievous demons and upgrade kit like the 'Demon Sweeper' to suck the skirts clean off your suitors!

tc.name: 少女☆射擊2
tc.short_description: 『少女☆射擊2』是一款因為奇妙事件而成為超級萬人迷的主角，使用眼力（通稱：費洛蒙射擊）讓接二連三前來追求的女孩子們升天，並以屬意的女主角為目標的奇特眼力射擊遊戲。 有點無厘頭又色色的內容依然健在！ 除了各式各樣的新要素之外，還能透過本作獨有的「吸入」，盡情享受女孩子們惹人憐愛的反應！

en.name: Rusty Lake Hotel
en.short_description: Are you ready to serve the guests in the Rusty Lake Hotel? Solve all mysteries in this dark and eerie puzzle game. Rusty Lake Hotel is a point-and-click adventure by the creators of the Rusty Lake & Cube Escape series.

tc.name: Rusty Lake Hotel
tc.short_description: 《鏽湖飯店》是一款獨特的益智遊戲，它離奇古怪的場景設置靈感源自於大衛‧林區的電視連續劇《雙峰》。

en.name: Distant Worlds 2
en.short_description: Distant Worlds 2 is a vast, pausable real-time 4X space strategy game.

tc.name: Distant Worlds 2
tc.short_description: Distant Worlds 2 is a vast, pausable real-time 4X space strategy game.

en.name: Blockland
en.short_description: Blockland is a non-linear sandbox game with no set goals, giving players the freedom to design and construct elaborate structures. Styled as a tiny minifigure, players build inside of the virtual world using bricks reminiscent of toy blocks.

tc.name: Blockland
tc.short_description: Blockland is a non-linear sandbox game with no set goals, giving players the freedom to design and construct elaborate structures. Styled as a tiny minifigure, players build inside of the virtual world using bricks reminiscent of toy blocks.

en.name: TT Isle of Man: Ride on the Edge 2
en.short_description: Racing across an over 60 km long ultra-technical track at breakneck speed requiring realistic riding skills... that is the challenge that awaits in TT2! Lots of new features lie ahead: open world, reworked physics, classic motorbikes, and more…

tc.name: TT Isle of Man: Ride on the Edge 2
tc.short_description: 在超越60公里長的超技術賽道，以超凡騎術的危險速度賽車……這些挑戰盡在TT2中！許多新功能就在眼前：開放世界、重新調整的物理機制、經典摩托車、以及更多內容……

en.name: Blood Bowl - Legendary Edition
en.short_description: Inspired by the Warhammer Fantasy world, Blood Bowl is an ultra-violent combination of strategy and sports games. The Legendary Edition features 20 playable races, including 11 that are totally new, each offering its own game style! Make a competitive team, train it and buy the best equipment.

tc.name: Blood Bowl - Legendary Edition
tc.short_description: Inspired by the Warhammer Fantasy world, Blood Bowl is an ultra-violent combination of strategy and sports games. The Legendary Edition features 20 playable races, including 11 that are totally new, each offering its own game style! Make a competitive team, train it and buy the best equipment.

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
en.short_description: With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new...

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
tc.short_description: Sid Meier 的 Civilization (文明帝國) 系列在全球已售出逾六百萬套，並獲各地支持者與媒體好評，被視為是史上最經典的電腦遊戲系列之一。 現在，Sid Meier 與 Firaxis Games 更把這一款引人入迷的有趣遊戲帶往另一高峰，加入新的遊戲方式，新的勝敗條件，新的工具來管理擴張您的文明，並用全新的方法，讓自訂遊戲更簡單，多人模式更有趣，選項更多。 Civilization IV 有細緻的畫面，彷彿活著的 3D 世界，把遊戲體驗提升至全新的境界。 Civilization IV 已受玩家讚為 2005 年十大遊戲，是全球玩家都一定要擁有的遊戲！

en.name: Dominions 5 - Warriors of the Faith
en.short_description: In Dominions 5 you take control of a powerful being that rules a nation and aspires to godhood. The type of Pretender Gods can vary from magically powerful arch mages to huge titans or large monuments. Dominions is a deep 4x turn based strategy game with a very large variety of spells and units.

tc.name: Dominions 5 - Warriors of the Faith
tc.short_description: In Dominions 5 you take control of a powerful being that rules a nation and aspires to godhood. The type of Pretender Gods can vary from magically powerful arch mages to huge titans or large monuments. Dominions is a deep 4x turn based strategy game with a very large variety of spells and units.

en.name: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow – Mirror of Fate HD
en.short_description: This sequel to Castlevania: Lords of Shadow reveals the story of the Belmonts as they battle destiny across generations to discover their true fate. Trevor Belmont, knight of the Brotherhood of Light, embarks on an epic quest to avenge his mother who was killed by his father Gabriel.

tc.name: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow – Mirror of Fate HD
tc.short_description: This sequel to Castlevania: Lords of Shadow reveals the story of the Belmonts as they battle destiny across generations to discover their true fate. Trevor Belmont, knight of the Brotherhood of Light, embarks on an epic quest to avenge his mother who was killed by his father Gabriel.

en.name: Old Man's Journey
en.short_description: Old Man’s Journey, a soul-searching puzzle adventure, tells a story of life, loss, and hope. Interacting with the world around you, you'll shape the landscape to create the old man's path forward. Experience heartache and hope as you embark on a heartfelt journey through a sunkissed world.

tc.name: 回憶之旅
tc.short_description: 「老人之旅」，一個靈魂探索的謎題冒險，講述了人生、失落和希望的故事。透過與周遭世界的互動，你將塑造景觀，創造老人的前進之路。當你透過沉重的世界開始一段心靈悸動之旅，就能體驗心痛和希望的感受。

en.name: Stacking
en.short_description: Embark on an adventure to rescue Charlie’s family from the nefarious industrialist known only as the 'Baron.'

tc.name: Stacking
tc.short_description: Embark on an adventure to rescue Charlie’s family from the nefarious industrialist known only as the 'Baron.'

en.name: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion: HD Renovation
en.short_description: Can you survive 1000 rooms of cute terror? Or will you break once the cuteness starts to fade off and you're running for your life from the unspeakable hideous beings that shake and writhe in bowels of this house? They wait for you, they wait and hunger for meeting you.

tc.name: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion: HD Renovation
tc.short_description: Can you survive 1000 rooms of cute terror? Or will you break once the cuteness starts to fade off and you're running for your life from the unspeakable hideous beings that shake and writhe in bowels of this house? They wait for you, they wait and hunger for meeting you.

en.name: FPS Monitor – hardware in-game & desktop overlays
en.short_description: FPS Monitor tracks your PC's hardware state and displays this information as an overlay in-game or over desktop. Does not require configuration, it works immediately after installation.

tc.name: FPS Monitor – hardware in-game & desktop overlays
tc.short_description: FPS Monitor tracks your PC's hardware state and displays this information as an overlay in-game or over desktop. Does not require configuration, it works immediately after installation.

en.name: TRYP FPV: Drone Racer Simulator
en.short_description: Fly freely and perfect your skills as an FPV pilot without the risk of breakage, with hyper-realistic visuals and flight sensations. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, TRYP FPV is the next-generation simulator that immerses you in the pure adrenaline of FPV drone flying.

tc.name: TRYP FPV: Drone Racer Simulator
tc.short_description: 自由飛行並提升您的FPV飛行技能，無需擔心損壞，享受超逼真的視覺效果和飛行體驗。無論您是新手還是專家，TRYP FPV 都是新一代模擬器，讓您沉浸在純粹的FPV飛行刺激之中。

en.name: FINAL FANTASY V
en.short_description: The original FINAL FANTASY V comes to life with completely new graphics and audio as a 2D pixel remaster! A remodeled take on the fifth game in the world-renowned FINAL FANTASY series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

tc.name: FINAL FANTASY V
tc.short_description: 以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY V》像素複刻版。著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第五作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。 原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

en.name: Killsquad
en.short_description: Hack and slash? Check. Twin-stick-shooter? Check. 4 player coop to slay hordes of aliens & bosses with your friends? Check. Skills, upgrades, weapons, gears, talismans and more to make you stronger? Check. Wake up, bounty hunter. We have a mission for you. Time to clean up the scum of the galaxy.

tc.name: Killsquad
tc.short_description: 砍杀敌人的快感？有！双摇杆射击？有！跟好友组队合力歼灭外星人和坏蛋？有！大量技能升级、武器装备及护身符等功能让您遇强愈强？统统都有！快醒来吧，赏金猎人。我们有任务给您，是时候去替天行道，把银河系的渣滓垃圾一举扫清。

en.name: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-shot Adventure
en.short_description: Smash skeletons, defeat dragons, and battle giant golems in Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-Shot Adventure. Experience the acclaimed 2013 quest that started it all in this standalone campaign jam-packed with fantasy, fun, and mountains of magical loot!

tc.name: 奇幻樂園大冒險之小蒂娜強襲龍堡
tc.short_description: 在《奇幻樂園大冒險之小蒂娜強襲龍堡》裡揍扁骷髏、擊倒巨龍，並和巨大魔像展開激鬥。這款發行於2013年、獲獎無數的作品，為大家帶來滿滿的奇幻與樂趣，還有超多魔法戰利品！

en.name: The Jackbox Party Pack 2
en.short_description: The sequel to the party game phenomenon The Jackbox Party Pack, featuring FIVE fresh, rib-tickling party games! Your phones or tablets are your controllers – no big mess of controllers needed. For up to 8 players plus an Audience of up to 10,000! It’s a game-night riot in a box… without the box!

tc.name: The Jackbox Party Pack 2
tc.short_description: The sequel to the party game phenomenon The Jackbox Party Pack, featuring FIVE fresh, rib-tickling party games! Your phones or tablets are your controllers – no big mess of controllers needed. For up to 8 players plus an Audience of up to 10,000! It’s a game-night riot in a box… without the box!

en.name: Ten Trials of Babel: The Doppelganger Maze
en.short_description: Otome × Death Game × Mild Horror Multiple Endings Puzzle RPG

tc.name: 巴別十書：如何逃離二重迷宮
tc.short_description: 乙女×無限流×微恐怖 多結局解謎短篇遊戲

en.name: Rabbit and Steel
en.short_description: RABBIT & STEEL is a co-op action roguelike that recreates the essence of high-level MMO raiding in a randomized, simplified, bunny-sized package. Choose your class, gather your rabbit-eared companions and battle your way to the Moonlit Pinnacle!

tc.name: Rabbit and Steel
tc.short_description: RABBIT & STEEL is a co-op action roguelike that recreates the essence of high-level MMO raiding in a randomized, simplified, bunny-sized package. Choose your class, gather your rabbit-eared companions and battle your way to the Moonlit Pinnacle!

en.name: Disney•Pixar WALL-E
en.short_description: Based on the 2008 computer animated film from Pixar Animation Studios, the video game version of WALL-E involves playing as the lonely robot as he navigates a trash-tainted world and begins an unlikely trek across the cosmos.

tc.name: Disney•Pixar WALL-E
tc.short_description: Based on the 2008 computer animated film from Pixar Animation Studios, the video game version of WALL-E involves playing as the lonely robot as he navigates a trash-tainted world and begins an unlikely trek across the cosmos.

en.name: King’s Bounty: Legions
en.short_description: King’s Bounty: Legions is vibrant, well thought-out 3D online strategy game with turn-based combat in a vast and diverse game universe. Head into a world full of magic, wondrous creatures and wicked monsters. Become a knight, forge armor in the smithy and gather an invincible army!

tc.name: King’s Bounty: Legions
tc.short_description: King’s Bounty: Legions is vibrant, well thought-out 3D online strategy game with turn-based combat in a vast and diverse game universe. Head into a world full of magic, wondrous creatures and wicked monsters. Become a knight, forge armor in the smithy and gather an invincible army!

en.name: LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game
en.short_description: LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game is an action adventure game that brings the Pirates of the Caribbean world and all its colorful characters to life in LEGO Brick form. Players experience all the memorable scenes from all four films in the humorous and quirky LEGO Video Games style.

tc.name: LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game
tc.short_description: LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game is an action adventure game that brings the Pirates of the Caribbean world and all its colorful characters to life in LEGO Brick form. Players experience all the memorable scenes from all four films in the humorous and quirky LEGO Video Games style.

en.name: Garden Story
en.short_description: Embark on a wholesome adventure to save The Grove! Forage resources, combat the invasive Rot, and restore the community. Relax and enjoy the fruits of your labor in this charming action-RPG starring a grape.

tc.name: Garden Story
tc.short_description: 踏上拯救靈樹島的美好冒險！採集資源、對抗入侵的腐敗怪，並恢復破敗的社區。化身一顆葡萄，在這款迷人的動作角色扮演遊戲中，放鬆身心，享受辛勤付出的成果。

en.name: Mining Mechs
en.short_description: Unleash your inner miner as you commandeer a high-tech Mining Mech! Mine for valuable resources and upgrade your mech for even bigger hauls as you explore the underground. Fun to play alone or with up to 7 friends in online co-op multiplayer!

tc.name: Mining Mechs
tc.short_description: 在您掌控高科技挖掘機的同時，釋放您內在的礦工！挖掘寶貴的資源，升級您的機甲，以便在地下探索時收穫更多。獨自玩或與最多7位朋友線上合作多人遊戲，都非常有趣！

en.name: Birth
en.short_description: You are alone. You will build a creature, a partner, a wet warm heart, a collection of bones.

tc.name: Birth
tc.short_description: You are alone. You will build a creature, a partner, a wet warm heart, a collection of bones.

en.name: Dead Rising® 2
en.short_description: The sequel to the million-plus selling Dead Rising, Dead Rising 2 takes the zombie survival horror to Fortune City, America’s latest and greatest entertainment playground.

tc.name: Dead Rising® 2
tc.short_description: 銷量破百萬的Dead Rising續集，今次Dead Rising 2將喪屍及生存恐怖遊戲，一次過帶進美國最新最大的娛樂主題公園Fortune City。

en.name: Before We Leave
en.short_description: Before We Leave is a city building game set in a cozy corner of the universe. Nurture your Peeps and their surroundings while rebuilding and rediscovering civilisation. Settle new lands and planets while avoiding hungry Space Whales.

tc.name: Before We Leave
tc.short_description: 《Before We Leave》是一款城市構築遊戲，背景設定在宇宙中的一個舒適角落。照料您的小皮人和他們的周遭環境，同時重新建設及發掘文明。在新的土地和星球上定居，並躲避飢餓的太空鯨魚。

en.name: Exo One
en.short_description: A strange signal... an alien craft... an interplanetary, gravity-defying journey through space and time.

tc.name: Exo One
tc.short_description: 奇怪的信號…外星飛行器…穿梭星際與時間展開一場反重力的旅程。

en.name: Maitetsu:Last Run!!
en.short_description: 《爱上火车-Last Run!!-》是日本美少女游戏知名品牌Lose所制作的E-mote视觉小说。本作为本篇故事的二次强化版与各路线后日谈及续集的合集，拥有相当于两部作品的内容，字数高达200万字。本作由Cura担当原画与人物设计，进行豹负责剧本，并由tO(と)主导演出效果。中日文版同步在日本与海外进行发售。

tc.name: 愛上火車-Last Run!!-
tc.short_description: 《愛上火車-Last Run!!-》是日本美少女遊戲知名品牌Lose所製作的E-mote視覺小說。本作為本篇故事的二次強化版與各路線後日談及續集的合集，擁有相當於兩部作品的內容，字數高達200萬字。本作由Cura擔當原畫與人物設計，進行豹負責劇本，並由tO(と)主導演出效果。中日文版同步在日本與海外進行發售。

en.name: AER Memories of Old
en.short_description: Transform into a bird and fly to explore and experience a vibrant world of floating islands in the sky. Venture down into lost ancient ruins where each step leads you closer to the end of the world.

tc.name: AER Memories of Old
tc.short_description: Transform into a bird and fly to explore and experience a vibrant world of floating islands in the sky. Venture down into lost ancient ruins where each step leads you closer to the end of the world.

en.name: Betrayer
en.short_description: Betrayer is a first person action adventure game that takes you to the New World at the turn of the 17th century.The year is 1604. You sailed from England expecting to join a struggling colony on the coast of Virginia. Instead, you find only ghosts and mysteries. What catastrophe blighted the land and drained it of color and life?

tc.name: Betrayer
tc.short_description: Betrayer is a first person action adventure game that takes you to the New World at the turn of the 17th century.The year is 1604. You sailed from England expecting to join a struggling colony on the coast of Virginia. Instead, you find only ghosts and mysteries. What catastrophe blighted the land and drained it of color and life?

en.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
en.short_description: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II picks up where the award-winning Dark Forces™ game left off...with even more features and firepower in dazzling 3D graphics. As Kyle Katarn, you must acquire a lightsaber and learn the ways of the Force to become a Jedi Knight.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II

en.short_description: Miles Edgeworth's dramatic turnabouts take center stage! Experience both Ace Attorney Investigations games in one gorgeous collection! Investigate crime scenes and solve tough, intriguing cases through logic and deduction. When Edgeworth's past and present collide, his future begins!

tc.name: 逆轉檢察官1&2 御劍精選集
tc.short_description: 天才檢察官——御劍怜侍的逆轉劇，在此揭開帷幕！ 2大人氣作品合二為一，重生為更易於遊玩和更為華麗的合集！ 舞台從法庭轉為案發現場。 在現場，由玩家自己操作角色，搜集線索。 根據與相關人士交談得到的情報，以及找到的證物， 運用原創系統「邏輯」來應對疑難案件吧。 御劍怜侍的過去和現在互相交織，連接未來的故事就此展開！

en.name: Crossroads Inn Anniversary Edition
en.short_description: Crossroads Inn, a real-time management sim, unfolds in Delcrys' unique fantasy realm. Construct and oversee your inn, delight traveling heroes, and achieve renowned status for your services across the kingdom.

tc.name: Crossroads Inn Anniversary Edition
tc.short_description: Crossroads Inn, a real-time management sim, unfolds in Delcrys' unique fantasy realm. Construct and oversee your inn, delight traveling heroes, and achieve renowned status for your services across the kingdom.

en.name: Valhalla Hills
en.short_description: Lead your people. Survive the wilderness. Fight for honor. Reclaim your eternal reward. A brand new strategy game from the developers of Cultures and The Settlers II.

tc.name: Valhalla Hills
tc.short_description: 您用一生时间取悦您信奉的神。您将勇敢战斗并光荣牺牲。这一刻已经来临！可怜的海盗站在天堂大门前，等着进入瓦尔哈拉殿堂。但毫不领情的神未如他们所愿，当着他们的面关闭了大门。

en.name: Civilization IV: Beyond the Sword
en.short_description: Sid Meier's Civilization IV®: Beyond the Sword is the second expansion pack for Civilization IV - the 2005 PC Game of the Year that has become a worldwide hit.

tc.name: Civilization IV: Beyond the Sword

en.name: Epic Battle Fantasy 3
en.short_description: Epic Battle Fantasy 3 is a silly turn-based JRPG, full of useless NPCs, rabid cats, childish humor, unreasonably large weapons, anime boobs, and other nonsense. And it's totally free!

tc.name: Epic Battle Fantasy 3

en.name: Emily Wants To Play
en.short_description: It’s 11pm and the last house on your route. The windows are boarded up, the yard is overgrown, but the lights are on and the front door is open… strange place to deliver a pizza. You’re getting soaked from the rain, so you hesitantly step inside the house. You shouldn’t have done that.

tc.name: Emily Wants To Play
tc.short_description: Emily Wants to Play是一款包含策略元素的恐怖生存遊戲。你扮演一個送披薩的人，被Emily和她的三個玩偶困住。這些玩偶是活的，他們和你在一起在屋子裡遊蕩。Emily和她的玩偶想玩遊戲，你必須學會如何正確地玩他們的遊戲，否則你會丟掉你的小命。努力找到唱片、筆記和其他線索，幫你解開這個故事並活下來。今晚你必須活著逃出Emily的房子。

en.name: BlazBlue: Continuum Shift Extend
en.short_description: The second entry in the critically acclaimed BlazBlue franchise, BlazBlue: Continuum Shift Extend adds a number of gameplay modes, story scenarios, new moves, and an all-new playable character to further enhance the BlazBlue experience and solidify its status as one of the all-time great 2D fighters

tc.name: BlazBlue: Continuum Shift Extend
tc.short_description: 2D格鬥最高峰BLAZBLUE系列，CONTINUUM SHIFT EXTEND現已在STEAM上登場了！

en.name: The Great War: Western Front™
en.short_description: The Great War: Western Front is the definitive WW1 strategy game. Play a deciding role in history with this real-time tactical experience as you take charge in the iconic Western Front from 1914 to 1919. Pick your faction and lead your forces to victory.

tc.name: The Great War: Western Front™
tc.short_description: 《世界大戰：西方戰線》是教科書級的第一次世界大戰策略遊戲。在這個即時策略體驗中，您將重返 1914 到 1919 年的歷史，在著名的西方戰線中扮演運籌帷幄的決定性角色。選擇陣營並帶領將士們贏得勝利吧。

en.name: Blood Bowl 2: Legendary Edition (Classic)
en.short_description: Blood Bowl 2 smashes Warhammer and American football together, in an explosive cocktail of turn-based strategy, humour and brutality, adapted from Games Workshop’s famous boardgame.

tc.name: Blood Bowl 2: Legendary Edition (Classic)

en.name: Moonbreaker
en.short_description: Moonbreaker is a turn-based strategy, tactical skirmish game. The game is designed to be a true digital miniatures experience, set in an expansive sci-fi universe crafted by Brandon Sanderson. Direct Captain and Crew in gripping, ever-changing competition and adventure.

A minimalistic incremental game about time management that takes inspiration from roguelite games, with a focus on meta-progression. Every generation has a better chance at survival, because previous lives influence its instincts

en.name: Boomerang Fu
en.short_description: Slice and dice your friends with boomerangs in this frantic physics party game. Join a crew of your favorite foods as you grill, chill and spill your enemies. Discover ridiculous power-ups and stack them together in deadly combinations.

en.short_description: 2280 A.D. The last few survivors of a ruined Earth seek a new home: Mars, a planet whose inhabitants didn't take too kindly to outsiders. The Red Solstice is a tense, tactical, squad-based action game. Fight to survive with up to 8 players in co-op, or lead your own squad in single-player mode.

en.name: Vault of the Void
en.short_description: Vault of the Void is a fast-paced roguelike deckbuilder where the power is in your hands. Continuously customise your deck, crafting powerful combos and ingenious strategies. Upgrade your cards with Void Stones, infusing them with new abilities to help defeat the minions of The Void!

tc.name: Vault of the Void
tc.short_description: 《虛空穹牢》是一款快節奏的Roguelike牌組構築遊戲。掌控全局，運籌制勝。隨著遊戲深入靈活更改牌組，打造出最致命的連擊招式。用虛空石升級並自定義卡牌，為它注入新的力量，助你擊敗虛空及其爪牙。

en.name: Knights of Honor II: Sovereign
en.short_description: Become the king and fight over Europe in this fresh take on medieval real-time grand strategy. Manage provinces, gather armies, initiate diplomacy, and dabble in espionage. The path is open: become the true Sovereign of your people and bring them to glory.

tc.name: Knights of Honor II: Sovereign
tc.short_description: 在這款全新的即時大戰略遊戲中，選擇你的王國，成為中世紀的一國之君，踏上稱霸歐洲之路。管理行省、集結軍隊、拓展外交、以及派遣間諜，運用豐富策略角逐歐洲統治權。廣闊的統治之路：成為名副其實的君主，帶領人民走向榮耀。

en.name: Super Robot Wars 30
en.short_description: 30 years on, the battle for our world's future continues. Super Robot Wars is a tactical RPG that brings characters and robots from a variety of mecha anime together to battle their mutual foes.

tc.name: 超級機器人大戰30
tc.short_description: 累積30年的歲月——戰鬥吧！為了這顆星球的未來 超級機器人大戰系列，是讓各種動畫作品中登場的機器人， 超越不同作品的藩籬齊聚一堂，迎戰共同敵人的模擬RPG遊戲。

en.name: The Battle of Polytopia
en.short_description: Welcome to the unique, turn-based strategy game set in the strange, flat world of the Square. Lead one of 16 distinct civilizations to victory by expanding your empire, researching technologies, and ultimately become ruler of the world! Play in single-player or multiplayer mode for up to 16 players.

tc.name: The Battle of Polytopia
tc.short_description: 欢迎来到这款独特的回合制策略游戏，游戏背景设定在一个奇异而又平坦的“方块”星球。领导 12 个不同文明中的一个，扩张帝国、研究科技并成为整个星球的统治者来最终取得胜利！支持单人 和多人模式，最多支持 12 名玩家。

en.name: Otaku's Fantasy
en.short_description: A new world had opened the door for me. All kinds of women threw themselves at me, and for all kinds of strange reasons. No matter it is a mixed-race lady with huge buttocks, a well-known news anchor secretly wants to be whipped, or a hungry cugar that almost eats me up, they all wants to know what it's like to be with me.

tc.name: Otaku's Fantasy
tc.short_description: 那之后，从零开始的异世界向我敞开了大门。豐腴的混血大美女、不為人知的知性美女主持人、投資公司的女性能手、超一流大公司美女OL、還有如狼似虎的名流人妻。日復一日我被那些充滿好奇以及渴望的女人們玩弄，眼下想要阻止這種事繼續發生的話，貌似已經晚了完全停不下來了！這就是宅男夢寐以求的世界！

en.name: Loading Screen Simulator

tc.short_description: Shadows: Awakening 是一款獨特的即時策略類等軸視角單人 RPG 遊戲。由你控制一個從暗影之境召喚而來的吞噬魔，吞噬那些陣亡已久的英雄們的靈魂並開啟一段史詩級的冒險。遊戲充滿挑戰，故事劇情引人入勝，且畫面精美。

en.name: Unsung Warriors - Prologue
en.short_description: Unsung Warriors is a 2D action-adventure game set in Iron Age inspired Europe. Fight your way past enemies and traps, while exploring the secrets of an ancient crypt.

tc.name: Unsung Warriors - Prologue
tc.short_description: Unsung Warriors is a 2D action-adventure game set in Iron Age inspired Europe. Fight your way past enemies and traps, while exploring the secrets of an ancient crypt.

en.name: The Thrill of the Fight - VR Boxing
en.short_description: The Thrill of the Fight is a room-scale only VR boxing game focused on authenticity. Face off in the virtual ring where you'll jab, dodge, and sweat your way to the top of the boxing world. Grab your gloves, step through the ropes, and become a champion.

en.short_description: A survival crafting adventure set in the Fourth Age of Middle-earth. Lead the Dwarves to reclaim Moria - mine, build, and battle through procedurally generated depths alone or with up to 8 players in co-op. It is time to return to Moria!

en.name: Deus Ex: The Fall
en.short_description: Deus Ex: The Fall is set in 2027– a golden era for science, technology and human augmentation, but also a time of great social divide and global conspiracy. Powerful corporations have seized control from governments and command the drug supply needed by augmented humans to survive.

tc.name: Deus Ex: The Fall

en.short_description: State of Mind is a futuristic thriller game delving into transhumanism. The game explores themes of separation, disjuncture and reunification, in a world that is torn between a dystopian material reality and a utopian virtual future.

tc.name: State of Mind

en.name: WARMACHINE: Tactics
en.short_description: Turn-based tactical combat set in the award-winning world of the Iron Kingdoms. Command your custom squad of steam-powered robots and elite warriors in raging battles dominated by magic and mechanika. Battle in online multiplayer and play the epic 21-mission single player campaign!

Command your custom squad of steam-powered robots and elite warriors in raging battles dominated by magic and mechanika. en.short_description: Can you change Deponia's fate? Do you have what it takes to change Rufus' past, present and future without accidently destroying the whole planet? Fight time itself in this action-packed, platypus-tastic and insanely hilarious story.

tc.short_description: 和同伴一起，利用顏色變換、三消射擊和各式神奇道具，在充滿未知的星球上不斷前進。此刻，你們將踏上奇妙的冒險旅程，去發現新的生機與希望！

en.short_description: Descend into the grim and gritty world of Purgatory in this cover-based shooter which combines the fluidity of twin-stick controls and tactical cover usage. Dodge behind cover as you try to outgun your enemies in the unknown procedurally generated hunting grounds.

tc.short_description: 進入灰暗又粗獷的煉獄世界，體驗節奏明快的掩護型射擊遊戲。結合雙搖桿與戰術掩護技巧，打造流暢戰鬥。探索程式生成的未知狩獵場，尋找掩護並擊敗敵人。

en.name: Orbo's Odyssey
en.short_description: Hop into Orbo's shoes! Run, jump and drill around your boss's office, make some new friends, and uncover terrifying secrets about the company you work for in this comedically surreal 3D platformer!

en.short_description: Haunt your way through town in the dead of night! Possess objects to scare people away from a museum, a hospital, a theatre and a cruise ship. tc.short_description: 這個遊戲講述了將在七天後自殺的男主角，在這七天內所遭遇的壹系列離奇詭異、恐怖陰慘的事件……面對註定的結局，男主角會做出怎樣的選擇？

en.name: Songs for a Hero - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: A classic platform with a twist: A dynamic soundtrack and funny lyrics that sings the player's actions and responds to what is happening during the adventure.

tc.name: Songs for a Hero - Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: A classic platform with a twist: A dynamic soundtrack and funny lyrics that sings the player's actions and responds to what is happening during the adventure.

en.short_description: Gedonia is a classic open world rpg, featuring a complete freedom of building your character, exploring a huge world and completing quests.

en.name: Apollo Justice: Ace Attorney Trilogy
en.short_description: Join rookie attorney Apollo Justice and his mentor, the legendary Phoenix Wright, in this collection of 3 games! This title features 16 episodes (including previously DLC-only episodes) and supports English, French, German, Japanese Korean, and Traditional and Simplified Chinese.

tc.name: 逆轉裁判456 王泥喜精選集
tc.short_description: 律師　王泥喜法介的成長故事即將重現眼前！ 以新人律師「王泥喜法介」與傳奇律師「成步堂龍一」為主角的3部人氣作品將集合為一全新登場！ 收錄《逆轉裁判4》、《逆轉裁判5》及《逆轉裁判6》本篇故事14章及下載內容的特別編2章，共有16章！ 本作除了是「逆轉裁判」粉絲們期待已久的精選集之餘，亦是同系列中收錄了最多豐富內容的作品！ 除了日文和英文外，本作更支援法文、德文、中文（繁體／簡體）及韓文，令玩家能以多種語言來遊玩《逆轉裁判456》！ 來體驗更精緻，更為真實的法庭戰鬥吧！

en.name: Raw Data
en.short_description: Built from the ground up for VR, Raw Data’s action gameplay, intuitive controls, challenging enemies, and sci-fi atmosphere will completely immerse you within the surreal world of Eden Corp. Go solo or team up and become the adrenaline-charged heroes of your own futuristic technothriller.

en.name: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II
en.short_description: Civil war has broken out across Erebonia. After his narrow escape from Trista, Rean will take up his sword again on a journey with his Divine Knight, Valimar, in search of his friends from Class VII and a way to end the conflict before its price becomes far too dear...

The player can control the enemy, eliminate obstacles or build new roads with different colors.

en.name: Stardom 3
en.short_description: *** This game is only available in Chinese *** 《明星志愿3》融合模拟、养成、冒险与益智，玩家扮演经纪人，处于旗下艺人被挖角、父亲心脏病发、公司负债上千万即将倒闭等困境，必须发掘培养出具潜质的明日之星来力挽狂澜。身为经纪人的玩家除了替明星安排行程、充当保姆跟着艺人跑通告之外，还必须辛苦地在游戏中的大小场景东奔西走，找寻新人、替艺人争取曝光的机会。

tc.name: Thriving City: Song
tc.short_description: 公元960年，趙宋王朝建立，社會百廢待興。作為新上任的知縣大人，你將帶領百姓開荒建城，振興百業，打造盛世繁華！ 車水馬龍，士農工商，看那酒樓茶坊遍布大街小巷，勾欄瓦舍唱盡人世悲歡。然而歌舞升平背後則是暗藏的危機。面對黨閥相爭、外敵入侵等重重困境，在時代的洪流中你將如何抉擇？

In an open world, tackle each renovation solo or with up to 4 friends. Pick up that hammer and start creating - Your dream house is waiting!

tc.name: 合同村
tc.short_description: 在開放世界中規劃、設計、建造和裝飾您夢想中的房子。打碎牆壁、勾勒佈局，然後建造和裝飾每一寸空間 - 內部和花園。在開放的世界中，您可以單獨或與最多 4 位好友一起處理每項裝修工程。拿起槌子，開始創造 - 您的夢想家就在眼前！

en.name: Kingdom Eighties
en.short_description: Kingdom Eighties is a short story-based standalone expansion set in the Kingdom universe. A rad adventure of micro-strategy and base building in vivid ‘80s neon. Defend your town against the mysterious Greed and discover the secrets of your family lineage!

tc.name: Kingdom Eighties
tc.short_description: 《Kingdom Eighties》是獨立擴充內容，以短篇故事為梗概，擴展《Kingdom》系列的宇宙。遊戲中，你將深入 80 年代為背景的生動霓虹世界，展開精彩無比的輕策略基地建造冒險。保護小鎮，抵禦神祕的貪婪生物，揭曉不為人知的家族往事！

en.name: Builder Simulator
en.short_description: Builder Simulator is the perfect game for those who want to build a house, from the ground up, one brick at a time. On easy, the game will guide and teach you by showing you full instruction, but on hard you will get no help - instead rely on your builder skills and make everything yourself.

Race against a 30 second timer as you descend floor after foe-filled floor and attempt to unlock the secrets of this deadly tower!Play as the fearsome Crimson Ninja, wielding an arsenal of deadly ninja weapons and attacks.

tc.name: Super House of Dead Ninjas
tc.short_description: 扮演另人畏懼的鮮紅忍者，備有眾多致命的忍者武器和招式，向下潛入看似無盡的高塔。這款 2D 動作平台遊戲是以 Megadev 和 Adult Swim Games 的熱門 Flash 遊戲為基礎，使用忍術來隨機產生高塔，因此每次的冒險都是全新的體驗！遊戲特色：原生支援控制器重回無盡之塔，充滿邪惡詛咒的堡壘！隨機產生關卡讓遊戲有高度重玩性180 間自定房間，其中 50 間是為了這個遊戲版本所製作大量的武器和物品解鎖升級，有數樣物品是第一次登場（例如火焰噴射器和球棒）獵殺八隻可怕的魔王和 49 種狡詐的敵人，包含致命的爆炸蘑菇Transdimensional Leakage：全新的高塔等著您探索透過 Ninjinity Engine...

en.name: 侠客风云传前传(Tale of Wuxia:The Pre-Sequel)
en.short_description: Tale of Wuxia: The Pre-Sequel, the authentic sequel of Tale of Wuxia which surpasses the latter it in every way, is a CRPG developed by Fenghuang Game and Heluo Studio. This U3D-based game includes better story, funnier events and enhanced gameplay.

tc.name: 侠客风云传前传(Tale of Wuxia:The Pre-Sequel)
tc.short_description: 《俠客風雲傳前傳》是由鳳凰遊戲與河洛工作室共同研發制作的壹款PC角色扮演類單機遊戲，此遊戲是《俠客風雲傳》正統續作，相比於《俠客風雲傳》劇情玩法更勝壹籌，並且增加了更多自由武俠世界的趣聞，該遊戲采用U3D制作引擎。

en.name: Miss Neko

tc.short_description: 麥克斯·考菲爾德發現好友莎菲在雪地中身亡後，打開了通往平行時空的通道。在這條時間線中，莎菲還活著，兇手也仍蠢蠢欲動！有了能穿越兩條時間線的跨界新能力，小麥是否能解開這樁謎案，阻止悲劇再次發生？

developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

tc.name: Scribblenauts Unmasked: A DC Comics Adventure

en.short_description: Walk upon a new world and slay foes endangering it. Rogue : Genesia is an action rogue-lite game, where you fight relentless hordes consisting of hundreds and thousands of monsters, make your build, break the balance, defeat bosses and save one of the many worlds.

tc.name: Rogue : Genesia
tc.short_description: 在無窮無盡的怪物浪潮中殺出一條血路！在《羅格：救世傳說》中化身無所畏懼的殺戮者，這是一場無休止的屠殺盛宴！拿起你的武器，斬殺一切擋路的敵人，拯救無數世界！（中文已上線，持續打磨中！）

en.name: ANAREA Battle Royale
en.short_description: ANAREA Battle Royale is the first project of AXC Games indie studio. ANAREA is a fast-paced Third Person Shooter Battle Royale arcady game aiming to be dynamic and competitive.

tc.name: ANAREA Battle Royale
tc.short_description: ANAREA Battle Royale is the first project of AXC Games indie studio. ANAREA is a fast-paced Third Person Shooter Battle Royale arcady game aiming to be dynamic and competitive.

en.name: Penny’s Big Breakaway
en.short_description: Ready. Set. YO! - Join Penny & Yo-Yo in a kinetic 3D-platformer bursting with innovative gameplay! Showcase your catalog of tricks and chain impressive combos to deliver Penny & Yo-Yo's perfect breakout performance. Take the stage with this vibrant pair in Penny’s Big Breakaway.

tc.name: 佩妮的大逃亡
tc.short_description: 各就各位，預備，溜啦！快來跟佩妮和溜溜一起暢玩這款充滿創新玩法的動感3D平台遊戲！秀出你的看家本領，使出令人目不暇給的連續技，讓佩妮和溜溜以完美表現逃出生天。在《佩妮的大逃亡》中跟這對活力四射的搭檔一起大放異彩吧。

en.name: The Cabin Factory
en.short_description: Your job at the Cabin Factory is simple: inspect the cabins and decide on whether they’re haunted or not. If you do find any anomalies, get out…immediately.

tc.name: The Cabin Factory
tc.short_description: 你在 Cabin Factory 的工作很簡單，只要檢查小木屋再決定是否有鬧鬼情形就好了。如果確實發現有任何異常情況，請立即離開。

en.name: Seek Girl Ⅱ
en.short_description: This is a casual intellectual game, get beautiful pictures and exercise your observation.

tc.name: Seek Girl Ⅱ
tc.short_description: 這款遊戲是一個智力休閒小遊戲，一次不重複的路徑吃掉所有兔子，就可以解鎖美少女了。（兔兔這麼可愛為什麼要吃兔兔〜）

en.name: Lifeless Planet Premier Edition
en.short_description: PREMIER EDITION - While seeking life on a distant planet, an astronaut discovers an abandoned Russian town. He suspects his mission is a hoax until a mysterious young woman saves him from a strange and deadly phenomenon...

tc.name: Lifeless Planet Premier Edition
tc.short_description: 一名太空人在遙遠星球上尋找生物跡象時，發現了一座廢棄的俄國小鎮。他懷疑這項任務就是個騙局，直到一名年輕的神祕女子助他脫離了一場奇異的危險現象...

en.name: Cyrano Story
en.short_description: Born from an Alternate Reality Game experience created by Alice & Smith in 2019, Cyrano Story is a complex puzzle game designed to ascend to intergalactic forces and give insight into the backstory of Funcom’s cosmic horror game Moons of Madness.

tc.name: Cyrano Story
tc.short_description: Born from an Alternate Reality Game experience created by Alice & Smith in 2019, Cyrano Story is a complex puzzle game designed to ascend to intergalactic forces and give insight into the backstory of Funcom’s cosmic horror game Moons of Madness.

en.name: Industries of Titan
en.short_description: Create a sprawling industrial city. Compete with other rival corporations on Titan for resources, territory, and power. Seek victory via technology, influence, warfare, or the wealth extracted from your citizens. Stake your claim to the Industries of Titan in this innovative sim/strategy game!

tc.name: Industries of Titan
tc.short_description: 建造一座不斷擴張的工業城。與泰坦上的其他對手企業爭奪資源、領地和電力。透過技術、勢力、戰爭等手段，或者榨取市民的財富來獲取勝利。在這款創新的模擬/策略遊戲中主張你對泰坦工業的權利吧！

en.name: Plebby Quest: The Crusades
en.short_description: Survive ambitious rulers dreaming of an empire, outsmart treacherous neighbors longing to burn your spoils, and navigate the religion’s predictably unreasonable demands; you need ask only one question as you build your legacy – “Will you burn them, or be burnt?”

tc.name: 冒險之旅：十字軍東征
tc.short_description: Survive ambitious rulers dreaming of an empire, outsmart treacherous neighbors longing to burn your spoils, and navigate the religion’s predictably unreasonable demands; you need ask only one question as you build your legacy – “Will you burn them, or be burnt?”

In this release we include "Officer Play" for the first time in the series, allowing players to advance from retainer to Castle Lord and then on to Daimyo.

en.name: HudSight - crosshair overlay
en.short_description: Create unique crosshairs for any game! Choose from many built-in crosshairs or download from the Steam Workshop, and create your own. User-friendly interface, anti-cheat compatible. Customize your gaming experience!

en.name: Risen 3 - Titan Lords
en.short_description: The world has been abandoned by its gods and is scarred from the rampage of the Titans. Humanity is struggling to regain strength. You, however, have more pressing concerns: your own life has been shattered and you must set off to reclaim what is lost amidst the darkness spreading throughout the world.

You are Amelia Cross, a stranded archaeologist who has awoken among the ruins of an ancient alien landscape. With the distant help of another survivor you must solve the puzzles of this mysterious world and find a way back home.

en.name: Marble Mayhem: Fragile Ball
en.short_description: Devilishly difficult but insanely rewarding physics puzzler. Play through 85 levels of diverse and ingenious physics-based challenges.

tc.name: 《Madden NFL 21》

In this treacherous place, where the Baron’s Watch spreads a rising tide of fear and oppression, his skills are the only things he can trust. Even the most cautious citizens and their best-guarded possessions are not safe from his reach.

tc.name: 人中之龍 極２ [Legacy]

tc.short_description: 《大俠立志傳：碧血丹心》是一款開放世界武俠RPG遊戲，更是一款像素版江湖生存模擬器，站在一個初出茅廬的市井小人物視角，還原在江湖底層摸爬滾打最終脫穎而出的逆襲經歷。
developers: 半瓶醋工作室（Half Amateur Studio）

en.name: Project Winter
en.short_description: Project Winter 2.0: Cabin Fever is an 8-player survival and social deception game where teamwork is vital, but betrayal is inevitable. Face the wilderness, uncover traitors, and survive paranoia in this streamlined yet chaotic multiplayer experience.

tc.name: Project Winter
tc.short_description: Project Winter 2.0: Cabin Fever is an 8-player survival and social deception game where teamwork is vital, but betrayal is inevitable. Face the wilderness, uncover traitors, and survive paranoia in this streamlined yet chaotic multiplayer experience.

en.name: Stranded: Alien Dawn
en.short_description: Brave a new world in Stranded: Alien Dawn, a planet survival sim placing the fate of a small marooned group in your hands. Forge your story through compelling and immersive strategic gameplay as you make vital decisions to protect your survivors.

tc.name: Stranded: Alien Dawn
tc.short_description: 在《滯困：異星黎明》勇闖新世界，在這款行星生存模擬遊戲中，您將掌握一個身處困境的小團體的命運。透過扣人心弦且身歷其境的策略玩法來打造您的故事：您要做出重要的抉擇以保護您的生存者。

en.name: SCP: 5K
en.short_description: SCP: 5K is a co-op or singleplayer tactical horror FPS project that puts players in the midst of a conspiracy where the SCP Foundation has turned on humanity. Enjoy Early Access as we continue to work towards a completed full release of the project!

tc.name: SCP: 5K
tc.short_description: SCP: 5K is a co-op or singleplayer tactical horror FPS project that puts players in the midst of a conspiracy where the SCP Foundation has turned on humanity. Enjoy Early Access as we continue to work towards a completed full release of the project!

en.name: Dead Island 2
en.short_description: A deadly virus is spreading across Los Angeles, turning its inhabitants into zombies. Bitten, infected, but more than just immune, uncover the truth behind the outbreak and discover who - or what - you are. Survive, evolve and become the ultimate Zombie Slayer.

tc.name: Dead Island 2
tc.short_description: 《Dead Island 2》是款刺激的第一人稱動作角色扮演遊戲，有著恐怖、黑色幽默與誇張的喪屍砍殺調製而成的獨特配方。探索遍地血污並且屍滿為患的經典洛杉磯風光。認識非凡的角色，並裝備大量武器、模組與技能，砍殺無數敵人，欣賞精緻的血液細節。

en.name: FINAL FANTASY IX
en.short_description: Selling over five million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on Steam! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew on PC !

tc.name: FINAL FANTASY IX
tc.short_description: Selling over five million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on Steam! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew on PC !

en.name: SANABI
en.short_description: SANABI is an exhilarating stylish dystopian action-platformer. Play as a legendary retired veteran and use your signature prosthetic arm to jump over cliffs and skyscrapers, zip through bullets and traps and defeat powerful enemies.

tc.name: SANABI
tc.short_description: SANABI is an exhilarating stylish dystopian action-platformer. Play as a legendary retired veteran and use your signature prosthetic arm to jump over cliffs and skyscrapers, zip through bullets and traps and defeat powerful enemies.

tc.name: 鬼滅之刃 火之神血風譚
tc.short_description: 化為滅鬼之刃吧！

en.name: Strange Horticulture
en.short_description: Strange Horticulture is an occult puzzle game in which you play as the proprietor of a local plant store. Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your collection of powerful plants to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries.

tc.name: Strange Horticulture
tc.short_description: 《Strange Horticulture》是一款神秘解謎遊戲，你將扮演本地植物商店的老闆，尋找並辨識新的植物，摸摸貓咪，與女巫會交談或加入神秘教派。收集各種強大的植物，藉此影響劇情走向，揭開昂德米爾鎮的黑暗謎團。

en.name: Rabi-Ribi
en.short_description: Dodge bullets, missiles and lasers in battle as you wrap your head around that bunny girl costume! tc.name: Rabi-Ribi

en.name: Assassin's Creed® III Remastered
en.short_description: Relive the American Revolution or experience it for the first time in Assassin's Creed® III Remastered, with enhanced graphics and improved gameplay mechanics. Also includes Assassin's Creed Liberation remastered and all solo DLC content.

tc.name: Assassin's Creed® III Remastered
tc.short_description: 畫面更棒、遊戲機制更精進的《刺客教條 III 重製版》將帶玩家重新回味或初次體驗美國大革命的年代。更棒的是，另也包含《刺客教條：自由使命 重製版》和所有單人 DLC 內容。

en.name: Lucius
en.short_description: Equipped with supernatural powers, take control of Lucius as he begins his blood filled tour of horror through his own house.

tc.name: Lucius

en.name: Sniper Elite 5
en.short_description: The award-winning series returns as Karl Fairburne fights to uncover Project Kraken in 1944 France. The genre-defining authentic sniping, with enhanced kill cam, has never looked or felt better as you fight across immersive maps to stop the Nazi war machine in its tracks.

tc.name: Sniper Elite 5
tc.short_description: 獲獎無數的射擊遊戲系列載譽歸來。時間回到 1944 年的法國，卡爾·費爾伯恩為揭露「海怪計劃」而奮戰。這款堪稱同類始祖的正統狙擊遊戲，如今加入了升級版擊殺鏡頭功能，玩家必須闖入多個沉浸式地圖，奮力制止納粹戰爭機器的圖謀，帶來前所未有的體驗。

en.name: Empyrion - Galactic Survival

tc.name: Empyrion - Galactic Survival
tc.short_description: 《帝國霸業-銀河生存戰》是一個3D開放世界的太空生存冒險遊戲，你可以穿梭於宇宙中，在不同的行星中著陸。在生存條件惡劣又佈滿隱藏危險的太空中，建築、探險、開發、戰鬥並存活下來。

en.name: Potion Craft: Alchemist Simulator
en.short_description: Potion Craft is an alchemist simulator where you physically interact with your tools and ingredients to brew potions. You're in full control of the whole shop: invent new recipes, attract customers and experiment to your heart's content. Just remember: the whole town is counting on you.

en.name: Sanfu
en.short_description: 2000年，山城市新闻频道的电视画面莫名跳出一则旧广告，而广告的代言人是已经去世的特异功能少年——三眼神童。有传闻三眼神童的亡魂劫持了电视信号。 调查局受命展开调查。随着调查的深入，一个藏在黑暗处的犯罪团伙逐渐浮出水面。

en.short_description: Bad Rats is a physics puzzle game where rats finally get their bloody revenge on their new prisoners: The cats. Come up with creative solutions for each puzzle using physics, functional objects, and your specially trained Rats. Try different ways of solving each puzzle to finish faster or earn higher scores.

Your squad will follow your orders and your lead, working together as a team - instinctively, intelligently, instantly. You are their leader. They are your weapon.

en.short_description: A story-driven, action adventure combining exploration with fast-paced combat. Untangle the past as Kena, a young Spirit Guide in search of the sacred Mountain Shrine. Help free the spirits trapped in a forgotten village with the help of the Rot, her adorable (yet powerful) spirit companions.

tc.name: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
tc.short_description: 是一款故事導向的動作冒險遊戲，結合探險元素與節奏明快的戰鬥過程。玩家扮演年輕的靈魂嚮導凱那，尋找神聖的山神社，並解開她過去的糾葛。凱那身邊有可愛又強大的靈魂同伴「腐靈」，她在「腐靈」的幫助下，解救被困在失落村莊的遊魂。

tc.name: inZOI
tc.short_description: 「每段人生都是一则故事。」透過操控與觀察每位 Zoi 的生活，創造屬於你的獨特體驗。 藉由 inZOI 的強大工具，自由定製角色與建造夢想中的房屋。在細緻入微的模擬體驗中，迎接生活中的各種事件，感受生命的喜怒哀樂，體驗夢寐以求的生活吧！

en.short_description: Developed by id Software, and originally released in 1993 and 1994, the definitive, newly enhanced versions of DOOM + DOOM II are available as a combined product.

tc.name: DOOM + DOOM II
tc.short_description: 《DOOM》由id Software開發，最初在1993年和1994年推出，現在新的最終增強版《DOOM + DOOM II》已經以組合產品的形式推出。

en.name: Tropico 4
en.short_description: The world is changing and Tropico is moving with the times - geographical powers rise and fall and the world market is dominated by new players with new demands and offers - and you, as El Presidente, face a whole new set of challenges.

tc.name: Tropico 4
tc.short_description: The world is changing and Tropico is moving with the times - geographical powers rise and fall and the world market is dominated by new players with new demands and offers - and you, as El Presidente, face a whole new set of challenges.

en.name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
en.short_description: Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. The Ultimate Edition includes Dragon Age: Origins, Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening and all nine content packs.

tc.name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
tc.short_description: Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. The Ultimate Edition includes Dragon Age: Origins, Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening and all nine content packs.

en.name: Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth1
en.short_description: Packed with fast-paced, turn-based RPG action, fourth-wall-breaking, trope-demolishing dialogue, and more item, weapon, and costume customization than you can shake a Lvl. 1 Stick at, Gamindustri is a world set on turning the concept of the JRPG on its head!

tc.name: 超次次元遊戲戰機少女重生1
tc.short_description: 關於「戰機少女」系列—— 模擬現實中「遊戲業界」的「游汐葉界」，以女主角「妮普禔努」為代表，『架空』的遊戲主機均以美少女的形態登場，以「擬人化×萌元素×變身」為主題的ＲＰＧ遊戲。 『超次次元遊戲 戰機少女 重生1』是將此系列的第一部作品進行人性化調整之後而完成的重製版作品。

en.name: BIGFOOT
en.short_description: You are a Bigfoot hunter with an important mission: to put an end to rumours once and for all and prove to yourself that Bigfoot is not just a myth or an invention of the mind...

tc.name: BIGFOOT
tc.short_description: You are a Bigfoot hunter with an important mission: to put an end to rumours once and for all and prove to yourself that Bigfoot is not just a myth or an invention of the mind...

en.name: Company of Heroes 3
en.short_description: Company of Heroes 3 combines heart-pounding combat with deeper strategic choices in a stunning Mediterranean theatre of war. In Company of Heroes 3, every battle tells a story...what's yours?

tc.name: Company of Heroes 3
tc.short_description: 場面更浩大、效果更驚人，《英雄連隊3》結合驚心動魄的戰鬥與更高深的策略選擇，在絕美的地中海戰區展開一場場刺激的戰鬥。 《英雄連隊3》的每場戰鬥都有故事……那你的故事又是什麼呢？

en.name: DiRT 4
en.short_description: DiRT 4 is all about embracing fear. It’s about the thrill, exhilaration and adrenaline that is absolutely vital to off-road racing. It’s about loving the feeling of pushing flat out next to a sheer cliff drop, going for the gap that’s too small and seeing how much air you can get. Be Fearless.

tc.name: DiRT 4
tc.short_description: 領先全球的越野賽車系列回來囉！大地長征4讓你乘坐在有著強悍馬力的載具上，來感受地球上最艱難的拉力，rallycross與landrush。遊戲中「你的舞台」系統讓你只靠一顆按鍵即可創造出成千上萬種賽道。

en.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
en.short_description: Survive your evolution in Neogene Africa starting 10 million years ago. Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey is a third-person open world survival game where you Explore, Expand, and Evolve to advance your clan to the next generation in the exciting new adventure from Panache Digital Games.

tc.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
tc.short_description: 跟著《先祖：人類奧德賽》回到一千萬年前，在人類起源之際的非洲大陸率領家族，盡情探索環境、擴張領土並演化，成功存活下來。

en.name: Risk of Rain Returns
en.short_description: Carefully designed, beautifully remastered, and loaded with new ways to play—Risk of Rain is back and better than ever! Dive into the iconic roguelike full of unique loot combinations, enhanced with new Survivors, overhauled multiplayer, fan favorite content from Risk of Rain 2, and more!

tc.name: Risk of Rain Returns
tc.short_description: 精心设计、精美重置而且带来了更多全新玩法：《Risk of Rain》 将以前所未有的全新面貌重新归来！深入标志性的探索游戏世界，见证琳琅满目的独特战利品组合， 除此以外游戏中还将加入全新幸存者、焕然一新的多人游戏模式以及《Risk of Rain 2》粉丝们最热爱的内容 以及更多！

en.name: Burnout Paradise: The Ultimate Box
en.short_description: Download Burnout™ Paradise: The Ultimate Box today. Paradise City is the largest and most dangerous setting yet for the best-selling Burnout series. The massive setting gives players an open-ended world to explore, as they race their vehicles through hundreds of miles of roads and underground passages with more than 70 different cars.

tc.name: Burnout Paradise: The Ultimate Box

en.name: Half-Life 2: Deathmatch
en.short_description: Fast multiplayer action set in the Half-Life 2 universe! HL2's physics adds a new dimension to deathmatch play. Play straight deathmatch or try Combine vs. Resistance teamplay. Toss a toilet at your friend today!

en.name: Finding Paradise

en.name: Sunkenland

en.name: Pathologic 2
en.short_description: Pathologic 2 is a groundbreaking open-world horror RPG. Resist the plague. Make medicine. Heal people. Perform an autopsy. Trade to get what you need. Fight and kill if necessary. Survive. Struggle with an outbreak in a secluded rural town that is rapidly turning into hell.

en.short_description: Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines RTS by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Please visit the "Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition" page for additional user reviews.

en.short_description: Florence Yeoh feels a little... stuck. Her life is an endless routine of work, sleep, and spending too much time on social media. Then one day, she meets a cello player named Krish who changes everything about how she sees the world and herself.

tc.name: Florence
tc.short_description: 二十五歲時，Florence Yeoh感覺有點困惑。她的生活是日復一日地工作、睡覺，以及在社交媒體上打發大量時間。直到有一天，她遇到了一位名叫Krish的大提琴手，他改變了她眼中的整個世界。

en.short_description: Be Greater. Together. The incredible power of the symbiote forces Peter Parker and Miles Morales into a desperate fight as they balance their lives, friendships, and their duty to protect in an exciting chapter of the critically acclaimed Spider-Man franchise on PC.

tc.short_description: Be Greater. Together. 在佳評如潮的《Spider-Man》系列最新篇章中，共生體洶湧來襲，彼得和麥爾斯必須奮力一搏，同時設法兼顧生活、友誼，以及救人的重責大任。

Switch gears and take a trip in the Food Truck to concoct your own chilly creations and see who shows up!

tc.name: Iron Harvest
tc.short_description: 《鋼鐵收割》是一款即時戰略遊戲（RTS），背景設定為1920年代的架空現實世界，此時世界大戰才落幕不久。你將能在遊戲中控制巨大的柴油龐克機甲，在結合史詩單人遊戲與合作戰役的體驗中奮力廝殺。另外還有節奏緊湊的遭遇戰，將讓多人遊戲粉絲大呼過癮。《鋼鐵收割》正是我們期待已久的即時戰略遊戲經典之作。

en.name: Senren＊Banka
en.short_description: Senren＊Banka is a Japanese-style visual novel produced by Yuzusoft, a Japanese developer of romance VNs. This game commemorated Yuzusoft's 10th anniversary. It won numerous awards on the year of its release in Japan for its art, music, and characters.

tc.name: 千戀＊萬花
tc.short_description: 《千戀＊萬花》是日本美少女遊戲品牌Yuzusoft（柚子社）2016年製作的一款和風戀愛題材作品。本作發售後展現出了勢如破竹的高人氣，並獲得萌系遊戲大賞的年度准大獎以及Getchu美少女遊戲大賞中獲得綜合類排名第一的殊榮，在劇本、系統、圖像、音樂、影片、角色等多個獎項中也均有斬獲。

en.name: HITMAN™

Included is an expansive world, unique combat, shockingly realistic visuals, tons of player choice, and an incredible cast of dynamic characters.

en.name: From the Depths
en.short_description: Over 1000 unique components allow you to build and command voxel vehicles from the deep ocean to outer space! Forge strategies, allegiances and fleets strong enough to destroy eight deadly factions of the planet and reign supreme. A genre-defying mashup of simulation, building, RTS and RPG.

tc.name: From the Depths
tc.short_description: Over 1000 unique components allow you to build and command voxel vehicles from the deep ocean to outer space! Forge strategies, allegiances and fleets strong enough to destroy eight deadly factions of the planet and reign supreme. A genre-defying mashup of simulation, building, RTS and RPG.

en.name: Metin2
en.short_description: Become a part of the legendary oriental action MMO – now also on Steam! Put your skill to the test in epic PvE battles against dragons and sinister demon lords, enter merciless PvP duels and become a true martial arts master!

tc.name: Metin2
tc.short_description: Become a part of the legendary oriental action MMO – now also on Steam! Put your skill to the test in epic PvE battles against dragons and sinister demon lords, enter merciless PvP duels and become a true martial arts master!

en.name: Wandering Sword
en.short_description: Wandering Sword is a Chinese martial-arts RPG where you play a young swordsman caught up in a feud and nearly dies. Escaping the event puts you on the path of pursuing the highest form of martial arts and exploring the pugilistic world to become the great hero you are always destined to be.

tc.name: 逸劍風雲決
tc.short_description: 這是一款像素武俠RPG。玩家將扮演一名來自關外遼城的普通少年，因意外捲入江湖紛爭而身中劇毒，幸得武當掌門清虛真人出手才得救。自此，你夢想成為一代大俠，正式踏入了中原武林。你的選擇將改變整個武林故事，與江湖中各種俠客結交互動，甚至改變他們的命運！

en.name: BPM: BULLETS PER MINUTE
en.short_description: BPM is a rhythm-action FPS rogue-like where you must shoot, jump and dodge to the beat of an epic rock soundtrack. Delve into a randomly generated dungeon where one missed note can lead to your death. Gain game-changing abilities and loot powerful weaponry to defeat your ancient enemy: Nidhogg.

tc.name: BPM: BULLETS PER MINUTE
tc.short_description: BPM is a rhythm-action FPS rogue-like where you must shoot, jump and dodge to the beat of an epic rock soundtrack. Delve into a randomly generated dungeon where one missed note can lead to your death. Gain game-changing abilities and loot powerful weaponry to defeat your ancient enemy: Nidhogg.

en.name: DUSK
en.short_description: Battle through an onslaught of mystical backwater cultists, possessed militants & even darker forces as you attempt to discover just what lurks beneath the Earth in this retro FPS inspired by the '90s legends.

tc.name: DUSK
tc.short_description: Battle through an onslaught of mystical backwater cultists, possessed militants & even darker forces as you attempt to discover just what lurks beneath the Earth in this retro FPS inspired by the '90s legends.

en.name: Deponia
en.short_description: In Deponia, the world has degenerated into a vast garbage dump, in which the crotchety Rufus ekes out his sorry existence.

tc.name: Deponia
tc.short_description: 在德波尼亞，世界退化成了巨大垃圾堆，壞脾氣的魯夫斯在這裡勉強求生。

en.name: EVERSPACE™ 2
en.short_description: EVERSPACE 2 is a fast-paced single-player spaceship shooter with exploration in space and on planets, tons of loot, RPG elements, mining, and crafting. Experience an exciting sci-fi story set in a vivid, handcrafted open world full of secrets, puzzles, and perils.

tc.name: 永恒空间2
tc.short_description: 《EVERSPACE 2》是一款快節奏快的單人太空射擊遊戲，你可以在太空及行星上深入探索、大肆搜刮，體驗RPG元素、採礦及製造玩法。在生動的手繪風格開放世界中體驗刺激的科幻故事情節，踏上充滿秘密、謎團與危險的旅程。

en.name: BRAIN / OUT
en.short_description: Brain / Out is a multiplayer shooter with a nostalgic post-Soviet feel. Experience dynamic battles and exterminate your enemies with a large arsenal of modern weaponry. Lock'n'load!

tc.name: BRAIN / OUT
tc.short_description: Brain / Out 是一個前蘇聯風格的多人射擊遊戲。體驗動感的戰鬥並使用現代武器大幹一場吧!

en.name: Retrowave
en.short_description: Neon lights, palm trees, synthwave, '80s supercars speeding down an endless highway... Welcome to the world of Retrowave!

tc.name: Retrowave
tc.short_description: 霓虹燈，棕櫚樹，合成波，80年代的超級跑車在漫長的高速公路上行駛……歡迎來到Retrowave的世界！

en.name: Gotham City Impostors Free to Play
en.short_description: Gotham City Impostors is now Free to Play! Join the Batman "helpers" or junior Jokerz in the streets of Gotham full of bullets, bodies, and bear traps.

tc.name: Gotham City Impostors Free to Play
tc.short_description: Gotham City Impostors 現在開放免費下載！快加入成為「蝙蝠俠幫手」或「小小丑」，一同闖蕩高譚市槍林彈雨、陷阱重重的血腥街頭。

en.name: Galactic Civilizations III
en.short_description: Build a civilization that will stand the test of time in the largest space-based strategy game ever! Choose from dozens of unique races and make a name for yourself across the galaxy through diplomacy, espionage, technological advances, and more.

tc.name: Galactic Civilizations III
tc.short_description: Build a civilization that will stand the test of time in the largest space-based strategy game ever! Choose from dozens of unique races and make a name for yourself across the galaxy through diplomacy, espionage, technological advances, and more.

en.name: We Were Here Forever
en.short_description: You both awaken imprisoned inside the sinister Castle Rock - were you betrayed, or simply not that clever? Find out in the greatest co-op puzzle adventure in the We Were Here Series! Do you and your partner have what it takes to face the dark forces of this realm or will you be trapped… forever?

tc.name: 我們曾到此永
tc.short_description: 你醒來的時候發現自己被困在凶險的Castle Rock裡面－是否遭受背叛，還是只是不夠聰明？在合作解謎冒險We Were Here系列最新作品中找尋答案吧！你跟夥伴是否能夠對抗這個王國的黑暗勢力，或是你們將會永遠......囚禁於此？

en.name: Fate Seeker II
en.short_description: Following the previous one, “Fate Seeker II” character development, thinking and exploration and other elements. You can experience real-time combat without switching scenes, and feel the delightful martial arts anytime.

tc.name: 天命奇御二
tc.short_description: 《天命奇御二》由甲山林娛樂開發的原創武俠單機遊戲，接續前作角色養成、思考探索等要素外，此次結合無接縫地圖，融入獨特推理辯論及自由搭配武學玩法，創造出高自由度、寫實的江湖世界。讓玩家體驗到不切換場景的即時戰鬥，感受想打就打的快意武俠。

en.name: Kingdom: New Lands
en.short_description: Kingdom: New Lands builds upon the award-winning gameplay and mystery of Kingdom by introducing an abundance of new content to the IGF-nominated title while maintaining the simplicity and depth that legions of monarchs have come to experience and enjoy.

tc.name: Kingdom: New Lands
tc.short_description: Kingdom: New Lands builds upon the award-winning gameplay and mystery of Kingdom by introducing an abundance of new content to the IGF-nominated title while maintaining the simplicity and depth that legions of monarchs have come to experience and enjoy.

en.name: Castle Story
en.short_description: Castle Story is a creative voxel-based strategy game in which you can build castles one brick at a time using an army of little creatures called Bricktrons. Design and build your own castles, expand your territory in a vast landscape and defend your Bricktrons against onslaughts of hostile creatures.

tc.name: Castle Story
tc.short_description: Castle Story is a creative voxel-based strategy game in which you can build castles one brick at a time using an army of little creatures called Bricktrons. Design and build your own castles, expand your territory in a vast landscape and defend your Bricktrons against onslaughts of hostile creatures.

en.name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
en.short_description: From the dust of a gold mine to the dirt of a saloon, Call of Juarez® Gunslinger is a real homage to the Wild West tales. Live the epic and violent journey of a ruthless bounty hunter on the trail of the West’s most notorious outlaws.

tc.name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
tc.short_description: 從金礦的塵土到酒館的泥土，《Call of Juarez® Gunslinger》是對狂野西部軼事致敬的作品。玩家將扮演一名冷酷無情的賞金獵人，踏上充滿暴力元素的史詩級旅程，追捕西部最惡名昭彰的法外之徒。

en.name: Beholder
en.short_description: You’re a state-installed landlord in a totalitarian country. Place listening devices, steal and sneak into your tenants’ apartments. Use what you uncovered to report anyone capable of plotting against the state. You MUST! But WILL you?

tc.name: Beholder
tc.short_description: 你是一名在極權社會中被政府安插的樓管。你必須監視房客，偷窺、偷聽並為房客建立檔案！你報告任何會違法或密謀顛覆政府的人。你必須！但你會嗎？

en.name: Will To Live Online
en.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

tc.name: Will To Live Online
tc.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

en.short_description: With its extensive Tour of Duty campaign, a near-limitless number of skirmish modes, updates and new content for Counter-Strike's award-winning multiplayer game play, plus over 12 bonus single player missions, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero is a tremendous offering of single and multiplayer content.

tc.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
tc.short_description: 《絕對武力：一觸即發》不但有精心製作的 Tour of Duty (使命召喚) 戰役、幾近無限變化的對抗模式、絕對武力多人連線遊戲的更新和新增內容，更有超過 12 個額外單機任務。不管是單人還是多人遊戲，都絕對不容錯過。

en.name: Escape Room - Der kranke Kollege
en.short_description: You only wanted to make a visit to your sick colleague, but what you encounter is beyond your imagination. Discover the secrets of your colleague and find a way to escape the trap.

tc.name: Escape Room - Der kranke Kollege
tc.short_description: You only wanted to make a visit to your sick colleague, but what you encounter is beyond your imagination. Discover the secrets of your colleague and find a way to escape the trap.

en.short_description: Train hard, fight crocodiles and find love. Earn your place in the Punch Club ranks, and discover who brutally murdered your father, in this choose your own adventure boxing management tycoon.

tc.name: Punch Club
tc.short_description: Train hard, fight crocodiles and find love. Earn your place in the Punch Club ranks, and discover who brutally murdered your father, in this choose your own adventure boxing management tycoon.

en.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
en.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

tc.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
tc.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

en.short_description: Unite the Veilguard and defy the gods in Dragon Age™: The Veilguard, an immersive single-player RPG.

tc.name: 闇龍紀元™: 紗障守護者
tc.short_description: 在《闇龍紀元™：紗障守護者》這款沉浸式的單人RPG遊戲中統合紗障守護者並對抗諸神。

en.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021
en.short_description: Work your way to a service empire. Get your hands dirty in a highly realistic simulation game that pays major attention to details. Pay a visit to a new Auction house and buy cars in various conditions. Expand your range of services by investing in a new work space and equipment.

tc.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021
tc.short_description: Work your way to a service empire. Get your hands dirty in a highly realistic simulation game that pays major attention to details. Pay a visit to a new Auction house and buy cars in various conditions. Expand your range of services by investing in a new work space and equipment.

en.name: Minecraft Dungeons
en.short_description: Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe!

tc.name: Minecraft Dungeons
tc.short_description: 在全新的動作冒險遊戲中全力奮戰，遊戲靈感來自經典的「深入地牢」，也是 Minecraft 宇宙中的新成員！

en.name: WILD HEARTS™
en.short_description: Master ancient tech to hunt down giant beasts. WILD HEARTS™ is a twist on the hunting genre where technology gives you a fighting chance against giant nature-infused beasts. Hunt alone or with friends.

tc.name: 《WILD HEARTS™》
tc.short_description: 掌握古代科技，獵殺巨型野獸。《WILD HEARTS™》是狩獵類型遊戲的新形式，其中的科技將提供你與野性巨獸一搏的力量。可以獨自狩獵，也能與好友一同出擊。

en.name: ATOM RPG: Post-apocalyptic indie game
en.short_description: ATOM RPG is a post-apocalyptic indie game, inspired by classic CRPGs: Fallout, Wasteland, Deus Ex, Baldur's Gate and many others.

tc.name: ATOM RPG: Post-apocalyptic indie game
tc.short_description: 《核爆RPG》靈感源於經典的CRPG：《Fallout》、《Wasteland》、《System Shock》、《Deus Ex》、《Baldur's Gate》等系列。

en.name: High On Life
en.short_description: HIGH ON KNIFE DLC OUT NOW!! - Humanity is being threatened by an alien cartel who wants to use them as drugs. It’s up to you to rescue and partner with charismatic, talking guns, take down Garmantuous and his gang, and save the world!

tc.name: High On Life
tc.short_description: 人類遭外星人販毒集團威脅，這個集團想把人類當成毒品。你必須救援會說話且充滿個性的槍械，並與它們成為搭檔，打倒加曼圖斯一伙人，並且拯救世界！

en.name: 港詭實錄ParanormalHK
en.short_description: Paranormal HK is a first person horror game about Urban legends of Hong Kong, China. The story is about a crew of online supernatural channel“Beyond the Invisible” went to Kowloon Walled City to film a short movie for their latest episode and encountered something out of their expectations.

tc.name: 港詭實錄
tc.short_description: 《港詭實錄》是一款以中國香港都市傳說為題材的第一人稱恐怖冒險遊戲。故事講述一群年輕人為了錄製探靈節目“逃出靈界點”，來到九龍城寨遺址。然而這次的錄製卻因為一些突發事件變得詭異起來……

en.name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
en.short_description: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in a first-person, single-player adventure. The year is 1937, sinister forces are scouring the globe for the secret to an ancient power connected to the Great Circle, and only one person can stop them - Indiana Jones™.

tc.name: 《印第安納瓊斯：古老之圈》
tc.short_description: 在這款第一人稱的單人冒險遊戲解開史上最驚天動地的謎團。1937年，邪惡勢力席捲全球，尋覓古代力量的祕密，這個祕密與古老之圈有關，而世上唯一能阻止他們的人就是印第安納瓊斯。

en.name: ATRI -My Dear Moments-
en.short_description: "As the world sank, I found you." In the near future, a sudden and unexplained sea rise has left much of human civilization underwater. In a little town slowly being enveloped by the ocean, an unforgettable summer is about to begin for a boy and a mysterious robot girl...

tc.name: ATRI -My Dear Moments-
tc.short_description: 「在日漸沉沒的世界裏，我找到了你。」在不遠的未來，海平面原因不明地急速上升，導致了地表多數都沉入海中。在一個逐漸沉入海中的平和小鎮，屬於少年和機器人少女的，難忘夏日就這麼開始了——

en.name: MONOPOLY® PLUS
en.short_description: EMBARK ON A JOURNEY TO OWN IT ALL! Build your empire on a colorful and 3D lively city animated by funny sidekicks! MONOPOLY® PLUS brings the classic franchise to a new level on PC with amazing animations, customizable house rules!

tc.name: MONOPOLY® PLUS
tc.short_description: 展開縱橫天下之旅！ 與親朋好友在生動豐富的 3D 城市中建立自己的帝國。MONOPOLY® PLUS 擁有精細的動畫與可自訂的建築系統，將經典桌上遊戲在 PC 平台提升至全新的境界。

en.name: Pacific Drive
en.short_description: Face the supernatural dangers of the Olympic Exclusion Zone with a car as your only lifeline in this driving survival adventure! Scavenge resources, load up your trusty station wagon, and drive like hell to make it through alive.

tc.name: Pacific Drive
tc.short_description: 在這個迴圈式的駕駛生存冒險中，你的愛車就是你的唯一希望，和它一起勇敢面對奧林匹克禁區的超自然危險吧！搜刮資源並安裝到你的愛車上，拚命狂飆地活下去吧。

en.name: Sprocket
en.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

tc.name: Sprocket
tc.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

en.name: Iron Snout
en.short_description: Iron Snout is a fast, colorful and brutal fighting game in which you will be helping a piglet fight for its life against hordes of wolves.

tc.name: Iron Snout
tc.short_description: 狂敲鍵盤，一豬當關，在令人欲罷不能的戰鬥遊戲中，打敗成千上百的狼群吧！

en.name: Timberborn
en.short_description: Humans are long gone. In a world struck by droughts and toxic waste, will your lumberpunk beavers do any better? A sandbox city-building game featuring ingenious animals, vertical architecture, water physics, and terraforming. Contains high amounts of wood.

tc.name: 河狸浮生記 Timberborn
tc.short_description: 人類早已不復存在。在這個乾旱和有毒廢料肆虐的世界，你的木匠龐克河狸們的命運又會是如何？這款沙盒城市建造遊戲包含機智的動物、巧妙的垂直建築、多樣化的水物理運用與地形改造。當然還有絕對少不了的大量木材！

en.name: Ace of Spades: Battle Builder
en.short_description: Say hello to the creative shooter. Ace of Spades: Battle Builder is the first-person shooter that lets you create your battleground, destroy it, then create it again. Up to 32 players choose from seven unique classes and jump into team-based, multiplayer mayhem across an endlessly evolving battlefield, to construct, destruct and take out...

en.name: FIVE NIGHTS AT FREDDY'S: HELP WANTED
en.short_description: Five Nights at Freddy’s: Help Wanted is a collection of classic and original mini-games set in the Five Nights universe. Experience the horror in flat (non-VR) mode or VR. Oculus Rift and HTC Vive are supported. A VR Headset is NOT required to play.

tc.name: FIVE NIGHTS AT FREDDY'S: HELP WANTED

en.short_description: Forge your weapon and follow the path of the Jedi Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy is the latest installment of the highly acclaimed Jedi Knight series. Take on the role of a new student eager to learn the ways of the Force from Jedi Master Luke Skywalker.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight - Jedi Academy™

en.name: The Stanley Parable
en.short_description: The Stanley Parable is a first person exploration game. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will follow a story, you will not follow a story. You will have a choice, you will have no choice. The game will end, the game will never end.

en.name: Paint the Town Red
en.short_description: Paint the Town Red is a chaotic first person melee combat game set in different locations and time periods. The voxel-based enemies can be punched, bashed, kicked, stabbed and sliced completely dynamically using almost anything that isn't nailed down.

tc.short_description: Paint the Town Red is a chaotic first person melee combat game set in different locations and time periods. The voxel-based enemies can be punched, bashed, kicked, stabbed and sliced completely dynamically using almost anything that isn't nailed down.
