en.short_description: For The King is a strategic RPG that blends tabletop and roguelike elements in a challenging adventure that spans the realms. Set off on a single player experience or play cooperatively both online and locally.

en.short_description: The new reference in RTS at its best! The Wargame series returns to duty, larger, richer and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are engaged in a large-scale conflict where Western forces clash against the Communist bloc.

tc.name: Infection Free Zone
tc.short_description: 病毒肆虐全球，城市倖存者的命運就掌握在您手中。選擇聚居地，重建並改造建築，打造出自給自足的安全區。夜幕降臨後，您必須抵禦來襲的感染者，保衛家園！ 遊戲採用真實地理資料，您可在全球任意城市遊玩

en.short_description: Generation Zero is a stealth-action shooter where you wage guerilla warfare against lethal mechanical enemies. Explore a vast open world map inspired by the Swedish Cold War era, take part in the resistance alone or with up to three friends in seamless co-op.

en.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines

The game plunges players into the dark and gritty vampire underworld of modern-day L.A. as a creature of the night.

tc.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines

tc.short_description: 《神之天平》：與時間和命運對抗的ARPG。探索精雕細琢的世界，全方位強化角色，戰勝魄力十足的強敵。唯有排除萬難，才能續寫你的傳奇。

en.name: House Party
en.short_description: House Party is an edgy comedy adventure game inspired by classic comedies of the '90s. Every decision changes your story and every character has something to reveal. There’s also a button to take your pants off.

tc.name: House Party
tc.short_description: 你被邀请来到了House Party！这是属于你的夜晚！你可以选择好好做人，或者做个讨人厌的混蛋！新的故事线和选择都将取决于你的选择！快啦吧，派对已经开始了，就等你出场啦！

en.name: Travellers Rest
en.short_description: Craft, farm, build and cook! In Travellers Rest you will have to use all the available tools to become the best tavern keeper in the realm. Create unique dishes and drinks to please your customers as you discover the world and its colorful characters.

tc.name: 旅者之憩 Travellers Rest
tc.short_description: 制作，种田，建造和烹饪！在《旅者之憩》中，你可以使用各种工具成为这个国度中最棒的酒馆老板。制作独特的菜肴和饮料服务顾客，探索世界，遇见特色鲜明的各个角色。

en.name: Amnesia: The Dark Descent
en.short_description: Amnesia: The Dark Descent, a first person survival horror. A game about immersion, discovery and living through a nightmare. An experience that will chill you to the core.

tc.name: Amnesia: The Dark Descent
tc.short_description: Amnesia: The Dark Descent, a first person survival horror. A game about immersion, discovery and living through a nightmare. An experience that will chill you to the core.

en.name: Guns of Icarus Online
en.short_description: Assemble your crew, take to the skies in the premier PvP airship combat game. Guns of Icarus Online is all about flying massive airships, shooting big turret weapons, and working as a team for supremacy of the skies. Everyone as one, victory or death, together.

tc.name: Guns of Icarus Online
tc.short_description: Assemble your crew, take to the skies in the premier PvP airship combat game. Guns of Icarus Online is all about flying massive airships, shooting big turret weapons, and working as a team for supremacy of the skies. Everyone as one, victory or death, together.

en.name: Cossacks 3
en.short_description: Cossacks 3 is the return of RTS classics. Obtain resources, build cities and research technologies while taking command of great armies, crushing enemies in grand historical warfares on land and sea!

tc.name: Cossacks 3

en.name: Vampyr
en.short_description: London, 1918. You are newly-turned Vampyr Dr. Jonathan Reid. As a doctor, you must find a cure to save the city’s flu-ravaged citizens. As a Vampyr, you are cursed to feed on those you vowed to heal.

tc.name: Vampyr
tc.short_description: 倫敦，1918年——你是剛成為霧都吸血鬼的喬納森．里德醫生。身為醫生，你必須找到方法，拯救在這個城市中被流感肆虐的市民；你卻同時受到吸血鬼身份的詛咒，面對發誓要治癒的人，你卻需要以他們為餌食……

en.name: Transformice
en.short_description: Transformice is an MMO platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese! Will the almighty Shaman help you or just ruin everything? Millions of levels, hectic physics, skill trees, and more importantly... hats!

tc.name: Transformice
tc.short_description: Transformice is an MMO platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese! Will the almighty Shaman help you or just ruin everything? Millions of levels, hectic physics, skill trees, and more importantly... hats!

en.name: Cyber Hunter
en.short_description: Cyber Hunter is an open-world battle royale game featuring an unique combination of gaming elements, including survival, shooting and exploring. Any vertical surface in the Cyber Hunter world is climbable and players can glide down from high up.

tc.name: Cyber Hunter
tc.short_description: Cyber Hunter is an open-world battle royale game featuring an unique combination of gaming elements, including survival, shooting and exploring. Any vertical surface in the Cyber Hunter world is climbable and players can glide down from high up.

en.name: Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon
en.short_description: Step into a dark reimagination of Arthurian legends in this first person, open world RPG. Explore a world stuck in everlasting autumn, witness falling legends and make meaningful choices woven into a complex, branching storyline.

tc.name: Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon
tc.short_description: 踏入這款第一人稱、開放世界RPG，體驗對亞瑟王傳說的黑暗重塑。探索一個被困於永恆秋季的世界，見證傳奇的隕落，並在錯綜複雜的分支劇情中做出深遠影響的選擇。

en.name: Sanctum 2
en.short_description: Sanctum 2 is the sequel to the world’s first Tower Defense/FPS hybrid game. Pick from four unique character classes and embark on a mission to protect the oxygen-producing Cores from hordes of deadly aliens who are threatened by their existence.

tc.name: Sanctum 2
tc.short_description: Sanctum 2 is the sequel to the world’s first Tower Defense/FPS hybrid game. Pick from four unique character classes and embark on a mission to protect the oxygen-producing Cores from hordes of deadly aliens who are threatened by their existence.

en.name: Monster Prom
en.short_description: You have 3 weeks to get a date for Monster Prom! Go through absurd and funny situations, raise your stats and seduce one of your classmates. Beautiful art, bold, unapologetic dialogue and hard choices make up this Multiplayer (1-4 players) Dating Sim. Be your worst self.

tc.name: Monster Prom
tc.short_description: You have 3 weeks to get a date for Monster Prom! Go through absurd and funny situations, raise your stats and seduce one of your classmates. Beautiful art, bold, unapologetic dialogue and hard choices make up this Multiplayer (1-4 players) Dating Sim. Be your worst self.

en.name: Wayfinder
en.short_description: Become a Wayfinder, and unlock their powers as you choose your path and playstyle while pushing back a hostile force that has overtaken your world. A Co-Op ARPG where you directly shape and customize the endless adventures you go on with friends, because Wayfinders are stronger together.

tc.name: Wayfinder
tc.short_description: 快成為尋路者，選擇專屬的遊戲之道與玩法，解鎖各個角色的能力，並抵抗佔據世界的敵對勢力。這是一款合作模式的 ARPG 遊戲，你可以直接打造與好友一同展開的無盡冒險，畢竟團結的尋路者比單打獨鬥更強大。

en.name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
en.short_description: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes features an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe. Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world.

tc.name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
tc.short_description: 《LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes》講述了橫跨整個漫威宇宙的原創故事。玩家可控制鋼鐵人、蜘蛛人、綠巨人、美國隊長、金鋼狼等眾多漫威角色，攜手合作對抗洛基和許多其他漫威反派，阻止他們組裝足以摧毀世界的超級武器。玩家將穿越 LEGO 曼哈頓追捕宇宙積木，並造訪漫威宇宙的主要地點，如斯塔克大廈、小行星 M、九頭蛇基地和 X 學院。在首款 LEGO 電玩中粉碎、擺動和飛行，其中包含 100 多位你最愛的漫威宇宙超級英雄和超級反派，包括鋼鐵人、金剛狼、綠巨人、蜘蛛人、美國隊長、黑寡婦、洛基和死侍。扮演你最喜愛的漫威角色，利用你的超酷力量和技能拯救地球：鋼鐵人可飛行、懸浮、發射導彈，還可直接從胸口發射強大的單光束。

en.name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
en.short_description: On RuneScape’s forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft to survive in this co-operative (1-4) survival crafting game. Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can they hope to slay the Dragon Queen—alone or with allies.

tc.name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
tc.short_description: On RuneScape’s forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft to survive in this co-operative (1-4) survival crafting game. Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can they hope to slay the Dragon Queen—alone or with allies.

en.short_description: An online party game of drawing and guessing for up to 16 players with a variety of modes. Bring out the best (or worst) of your drawing and guessing skills!

tc.name: Draw & Guess - 你畫我猜
tc.short_description: 這是一款繪畫和猜畫的在線派對遊戲，最多可以 16 人一起玩，有多種遊戲模式。拿出您最棒（最差也行）的繪畫和猜測本領！

en.name: Angel Legion
en.short_description: Idle or play whenever and wherever you want. Customize the looking of your favorite Angels. Automatically accumulate resources all the time.

tc.name: 天使軍團-LSP放置RPG
tc.short_description: 放置輕松玩 養眼又護肝 捏臉更自由 時裝大家穿 上線不定時 資源隨時攢

en.name: Worms W.M.D
en.short_description: The worms are back in their most destructive game yet. With a gorgeous, hand-drawn 2D look, brand new weapons, the introduction of crafting, vehicles and buildings plus the return of some much-loved classic weapons and gameplay, Worms W.M.D is the best worms experience ever.

tc.name: Worms W.M.D

en.name: IXION
en.short_description: IXION is an unrelenting, city-building odyssey across the stars. As Administrator of the Tiqqun, DOLOS’ prototype space station, you are tasked with balancing preservation and exploration as you manage infrastructure, resources and crew. Can you keep the flame of humanity alight in the cold dark?

Unleash ravaging combos against a variety of formidable monsters and deftly dodge your way through a cursed land to seek audience with the Queen and dispel the evil that threatens all life.

en.short_description: It’s 1930. After an inadvertent brush with the mafia, cabdriver Tommy Angelo is reluctantly thrust into the world of organized crime. Initially, he is uneasy about falling in with the Salieri family, but soon the rewards become too big to ignore.

tc.name: Mafia
tc.short_description: 時值1930年。意外與黑手黨接觸的計程車司機Tommy Angelo不情願地加入了黑社會。起先，他為加入Salieri家族感到不安，但沒過多久，豐厚的獎賞多到讓他難以抗拒。隨著他的地位提昇，報酬變得愈來愈豐厚，但差事也變得更加骯髒齷齪。Tommy或許終能贏得Salieri家族的敬重，但成為黑幫份子將讓他對自己選擇的新生活感到更加的矛盾衝突。

en.short_description: When all the villains in Arkham Asylum team up and break loose, only the dynamic duo is bold enough to take them on to save Gotham City. The fun of LEGO, the drama of Batman and the uniqueness of the combination makes for a comical and exciting adventure in LEGO Batman: The Videogame.

tc.name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
tc.short_description: 當阿卡漢瘋人院的所有反派合作並逃脫時，只有「動力雙人組」夠大膽，敢對付他們以拯救高譚市。LEGO 的樂趣、蝙蝠俠的劇情，以及該組合的獨特性，讓《LEGO Batman: The Videogame》帶來讓人捧腹且精彩刺激的冒險。扮演蝙蝠俠和他的搭檔羅賓，打造、駕駛，搖擺並在高譚市捕捉逃脫的反派，包括小丑，企鵝，稻草人等。然後，從另一面跳入故事，並扮演蝙蝠俠的敵人！享受你所掌握的力量、與蝙蝠俠戰鬥，並在整個城市散佈混沌。善（或惡）永不停歇。

en.name: Need For Speed: Hot Pursuit
en.short_description: Need for Speed Hot Pursuit launches you into a new open-world landscape behind the wheel of the world's fastest and most beautiful cars. From Criterion, the award-winning studio behind the Burnout series, Hot Pursuit will redefine racing games for a whole new generation.

tc.name: Need For Speed: Hot Pursuit

en.short_description: Struggle to survive in a harsh medieval world. Hunt wildlife, mine resources, build structures, and craft weapons and armor in order to protect yourself. You may form a guild, bring war to all opposition, and try to seize the throne and become king!

As a space pirate, work solo, or in a squad with up to 3 other players to navigate a hostile battleground, hunt for loot, craft new weapons and gear, and salvage what you’ll need to survive.

tc.name: Marauders
tc.short_description: 《Marauders》是一款以反烏托邦科幻世界為背景的第一人稱多人戰術射擊遊戲。玩家將成為一名太空海盜獨自打拼，或是與最多 3 名其他玩家組隊，在危機四伏的戰場上闖蕩、與其他隊伍和 AI 對手展開激烈戰鬥並生存下來、取得無價的戰利品、打造新的武器和裝備，並收集求生所需的任何資源。

en.name: The Room 4: Old Sins
en.short_description: The disappearance of an ambitious engineer and his high-society wife provokes a hunt for a precious artefact. The trail leads you to the attic of their home, and the discovery of an old, peculiar dollhouse. What secrets lie within these walls?

As you explore a space colony, the character you decide to become will determine how this player-driven story unfolds. In the colony's corporate equation, you are the unplanned variable.

Struggle through changing seasons to build a base, develop technology and gear-up in the hostile environment. Defend yourself from wildlife, the elements and AI hunters (who also build bases in the world).

en.name: Hacknet
en.short_description: Hacknet is an immersive, terminal-based hacking simulator for PC. Dive down a rabbit hoIe as you follow the instructions of a recently deceased hacker, whose death may not have been the accident the media reports.

tc.name: Hacknet
tc.short_description: Hacknet是一款身歷其境，基於終端的駭客模擬器。跟隨一位最近逝世的駭客遺留的指示探索渾沌的網路世界。他的死因可能不如媒體報導的意外如此單純。

en.name: Tavern Master
en.short_description: Tavern Master is all about managing your medieval tavern. You start with a very small room, couple of benches and tables and build your way up to a huge successful tavern with a kitchen, rooms for guests, group of loyal staff and much more!

tc.name: Tavern Master

Treasures, magical trinkets, and a growing cast of heroes will grant you the power to vanquish these horrors from beyond. How long can you survive?

tc.name: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
tc.short_description: 《異形：特戰菁英》是第三人稱合作生存遊戲，背景設定在著名的異形宇宙。在你嘗試遏止這日益擴大的威脅的征途中，與不同種類的異形群戰鬥、自訂你的角色和裝備，並提升等級。

en.name: Brutal Legend
en.short_description: Brütal Legend is an action-adventure that marries visceral action combat with open-world freedom. Set in a universe somewhere between Lord of the Rings and Spinal Tap, it’s a fresh take on the action/driving genre, which in this case is full of imitation cover bands, demons intent on enslaving humanity and Heavy metal tunes.

tc.name: Brutal Legend
tc.short_description: 《惡黑搖滾》(Brütal Legend) 是一款結合動作鮮明的戰鬥與自由開放世界的動作冒險遊戲。遊戲的世界觀大概介於《魔戒》(Lord of the Rings) 與《搖滾萬萬歲》(Spinal Tap) 之間，這對於動作／駕駛遊戲類型是全新的嘗試；這裡充滿了模仿翻唱樂團，還有惡魔想要奴役人類與重金屬音樂。傑克·布萊克 (Jack Black)，出色的喜劇演員和音樂家，扮演萬用樂團技師 Eddie Riggs，還有許多在金屬音樂中最出名的人們客串演出，玩家和金屬樂迷絕對不能錯過這場瘋狂的冒險旅程。 PC 版本的《惡黑搖滾》包含兩款多人遊戲地圖包 Hammer of Infinite Fate 與 Tears of the Hextadon 作為免費額外內容。

en.name: The Witness

en.name: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

en.name: The Room
en.short_description: A mysterious invitation leads to the attic of an abandoned house. In the room is a cast-iron safe laced with strange carvings and on top, a note from your distant companion. It promises something ancient and astonishing concealed in the iron chamber - you need only find a way in.

As part of an expedition sent to find a home beyond Earth, lead your people into a new frontier, explore and colonize an alien planet and create a new civilization in space.

tc.name: Ghostwire: Tokyo

en.name: Loop Hero
en.short_description: The Lich has thrown the world into a timeless loop and plunged its inhabitants into never ending chaos. Wield an expanding deck of mystical cards to place enemies, buildings, and terrain along each unique expedition loop for the brave hero.

tc.name: Loop Hero
tc.short_description: 巫妖將世界陷進了永恆的迴圈裡，讓所有居民遭受無盡的混亂。使用一副不斷擴充的神秘卡片在每一位勇敢英雄的獨特遠征迴圈裡擺上敵人、建築物與地形。在不同職業英雄的戰鬥中回收並裝備強大的戰利品，同時擴充生存者的營地以加強對每一輪迴冒險的支援。

en.name: Book of Demons
en.short_description: Book of Demons is a Hack & Slash in which YOU decide the length of quests. Wield magic cards instead of weapons and slay the armies of darkness in the dungeons below the Old Cathedral. Save the terror-stricken Paperverse from the clutches of the Archdemon himself!

tc.name: Book of Demons
tc.short_description: 砍殺遊戲類型在這款遊戲中呈現最純粹的一面，而且非常地引人著迷。在老舊大教堂底下的地城中斬殺黑暗大軍，從大惡魔手中拯救受盡折磨痛苦的紙世界。

tc.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links

en.name: Blasphemous 2
en.short_description: The Penitent One awakens as Blasphemous 2 joins him once again in an endless struggle against The Miracle. en.name: Outward Definitive Edition
en.short_description: No remarkable journey is achieved without great effort. In Outward, the cold of the night or an infected wound can be as dangerous as a predator lurking in the dark. Explore the vast world of Aurai solo or in Co-op. The Definitive Edition features both DLCs and quality of life improvements.

en.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

tc.name: Starship Troopers: Terran Command
tc.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

en.name: Tribes of Midgard
en.short_description: A vibrant blend of survival and action RPG for 1-10 players! Craft legendary items, grow your home base and embark on an epic journey through procedural realms to face towering creatures hel-bent on unleashing Ragnarök. Valhalla can wait, Einherjar!

tc.name: Tribes of Midgard
tc.short_description: 生存與動作 RPG 元素的生動融合，可讓 1 至 10 名玩家一同遊玩！製作傳說物品、拓展大本營並踏上一段史詩之旅，在程序生成的國度中面對勢要引發諸神黃昏的龐大敵人。英靈戰士，先別急著返回英靈殿！

en.name: Sven Co-op
en.short_description: Sven Co-op is a co-operative game originally based around Valve Software's Half-Life. In this game players must work together against computer controlled enemies and solve puzzles as a team.

tc.name: Sven Co-op
tc.short_description: Sven Co-op is a co-operative game originally based around Valve Software's Half-Life. In this game players must work together against computer controlled enemies and solve puzzles as a team.

en.name: L.A. Noire
en.short_description: In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, LAPD detective Cole Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, conspiracies, and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department.

tc.name: L.A. Noire
tc.short_description: 在洛杉磯警局警探科爾．菲爾普斯（Cole Phelps）努力晉升、同時糾正社會風氣的同時，他還必須解開一系列縱火攻擊事件、陰謀和凶殘謀殺案的真相，打擊洛杉磯黑暗的一面，甚至還得與他自己所屬部門的同仁對抗。

en.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue
en.short_description: Introducing Assassin’s Creed® Rogue, the darkest chapter in the Assassin’s Creed franchise yet. As Shay, you will experience the slow transformation from Assassin to Assassin Hunter. Follow your own creed and set off on an extraordinary journey through New York City, the wild river valley, and far away to the icy cold waters of the North...

tc.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue

en.name: Children of Morta
en.short_description: Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG game about an extraordinary family of heroes. Lead the Bergsons, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. Will you be able to sacrifice everything to save the ones you care for?

tc.name: Children of Morta
tc.short_description: Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG game about an extraordinary family of heroes. Lead the Bergsons, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. Will you be able to sacrifice everything to save the ones you care for?

en.name: Little Kitty, Big City
en.short_description: You're a curious little kitty with a big personality, on an adventure to find your way back home. Explore the city, make new friends with stray animals, wear delightful hats, and leave more than a little chaos in your wake. After all, isn't that what cats do best?

tc.name: 小貓咪大城市 Little Kitty, Big City
tc.short_description: 扮演一只個性十足的好奇小貓，踏上尋找回家之路的大冒險！探索這座巨大的城市，結交各色的流浪動物朋友，戴上可愛的帽子裝扮，順便再製造一點小混亂...誰讓搞怪搗蛋是我們貓咪的拿手好戲呢？

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
en.short_description: Command any of the six unique factions in the next standalone expansion of the critically acclaimed Dawn of War real-time strategy franchise. Choose to build a massive army or lead a small squad of elite heroes into battle and experience a single player campaign customized to your favorite race.

tc.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
tc.short_description: 迎接人氣爆表的即時戰略遊戲《破曉之戰》系列獨立擴充，指揮六種獨特勢力的任一陣營。建立龐大軍團或率領精英小隊殺入戰場，體驗單人玩家戰役，自訂你最愛的種族。上線與敵人一決高下，體驗 41 世紀 的快節奏殘酷戰鬥。

en.name: DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: The Definitive Edition includes the critically acclaimed DRAGON QUEST XI, plus additional scenarios, orchestral soundtrack, 2D mode and more! Whether you are a longtime fan or a new adventurer, this is the ultimate DQXI experience.

tc.name: 勇者鬥惡龍XI S 尋覓逝去的時光 - Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Definitive Edition 內含備受讚譽的『勇者鬥惡龍XI』主遊戲，以及額外劇情、管弦樂配樂、2D 模式等等新內容！無論你是老練玩家或新冒險家，都能享受最極致的 DQXI 遊戲體驗。

tc.name: Door Kickers: Action Squad
tc.short_description: 拯救人质、解除炸弹，并拯救这所旧学校。这是一款有着复古的画面和感觉的横版卷轴动作游戏。包含在线游戏和本地合作模式。

en.name: The Room Two
en.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

tc.name: The Room Two
tc.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

en.name: The Past Within
en.short_description: The Past Within is the new co-op experience from Rusty Lake! Play together with someone you deem trustworthy: one in The Past, the other in The Future. Observe and communicate what you see around you. Solve the puzzles and uncover Albert Vanderboom’s plan.

tc.name: The Past Within

en.name: ELEX
en.short_description: ELEX is a handcrafted action role-playing experience from the award-winning creators of the Gothic series, set in a brand new post-apocalyptic Science Fantasy universe that puts players into a huge seamless game world full of original characters, mutated creatures, deep moral choices and powerful action.

tc.name: ELEX

en.name: Rogue Legacy
en.short_description: Rogue Legacy is a genealogical rogue-"LITE" where anyone can be a hero. Each time you die, your child will succeed you. Every child is unique. One child might be colorblind, another might be a dwarf with vertigo. But that's OK, because no one is perfect, and you don't have to be to succeed.

en.short_description: Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

en.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
en.short_description: Gloria Victis is an MMORPG with an emphasis on realism, set in a low-fantasy medieval open world. Enjoy MMO with skill-based non-target combat, open PVP with territory control, deep crafting system and player-driven economy – all that served with beautiful graphics and an immersive atmosphere.

tc.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
tc.short_description: 《Gloria Victis》是一款侧重真实性的开放世界大型多人在线角色扮演游戏，背景设定为略带魔幻风格的中世纪。本游戏战斗系统无目标锁定机制，依赖玩家操作，玩家可在开放式的PVP战斗中争夺领土控制权。游戏的制造系统有深度而无所不包，经济系统由玩家主导，剧情成熟而宏大，画面写实而绚丽，向玩家呈现沉浸式的游戏体验。 游戏有两大阵营：居住在大草原上的自豪的中土人，以及住在寒冷北方又复仇心切的伊斯米尔人。玩家将选择一方加入，然后奔赴战场！

en.name: This Is the Police
en.short_description: This Is the Police is a strategy/adventure game set in a city spiraling the drain. Taking the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, you'll dive into a deep story of crime and intrigue. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse?
