en.name: Crysis
en.short_description: Adapt to Survive  An epic story thrusts players into an ever-changing environment, forcing them to adapt their tactics and approach to conquer battlefields ranging from newly frozen jungle to zero-gravity alien environments. Suit up!  A high-tech Nanosuit allows gamers to augment their abilities in real time on the battlefield.

tc.name: Crysis
tc.short_description: Adapt to Survive  An epic story thrusts players into an ever-changing environment, forcing them to adapt their tactics and approach to conquer battlefields ranging from newly frozen jungle to zero-gravity alien environments. Suit up!  A high-tech Nanosuit allows gamers to augment their abilities in real time on the battlefield.

en.name: Hand Simulator
en.short_description: There are many different levels where you can play with spinners, plunge into the subtleties of handling weapons, milk a cow, take part in a Mexican duel with your friends, have a good time fishing, play chess or simply chat in an anonymous club.

tc.name: Hand Simulator
tc.short_description: There are many different levels where you can play with spinners, plunge into the subtleties of handling weapons, milk a cow, take part in a Mexican duel with your friends, have a good time fishing, play chess or simply chat in an anonymous club.

en.name: She Will Punish Them
en.short_description: A sensual dark fantasy ARPG. Customize a stunning succubus with great body details, together with your companions fight intense combats with challenging bosses to get sexy outfits and powerful equipment, and between battles, chill and interact with your fellow maidens at the palace designed by you.

tc.name: She Will Punish Them
tc.short_description: A sensual dark fantasy ARPG. Customize a stunning succubus with great body details, together with your companions fight intense combats with challenging bosses to get sexy outfits and powerful equipment, and between battles, chill and interact with your fellow maidens at the palace designed by you.

en.name: Tales of the Black Forest
en.short_description: In a world filled with yōkai, a surging dark power has overshadowed a Japanese town. A group of 2 developers have produced a Japanese pixel adventure game to tell a tale that dates back to the Heisei era...In the name of dreams and passion.

tc.name: Tales of the Black Forest
tc.short_description: 暗潮湧動的日本小鎮，詭異多彩的妖怪世界，如煙花般綺麗的平成怪談物語……兩人團隊打造的日式像素風奇幻冒險遊戲，致敬自由、浪漫與夢想。

en.name: Awesomenauts
en.short_description: Use your power, show your might! Play this Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) game! AWESOMENAUTS combines 2D platforming with team-based strategy and hero based action. Whether you are a new recruit or an intergalactic legend, play AWESOMENAUTS!

tc.name: Awesomenauts
tc.short_description: Use your power, show your might! Play this Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) game! AWESOMENAUTS combines 2D platforming with team-based strategy and hero based action. Whether you are a new recruit or an intergalactic legend, play AWESOMENAUTS!

en.name: Impostor Factory
en.short_description: A bonkers time-loop tragicomedy murder mystery thriller featuring multiple casualties and a suspicious cat, from the creator of To the Moon & Finding Paradise.

tc.name: Impostor Factory
tc.short_description: A bonkers time-loop tragicomedy murder mystery thriller featuring multiple casualties and a suspicious cat, from the creator of To the Moon & Finding Paradise.

en.name: APB Reloaded
en.short_description: The world’s first and premier Action MMO Third Person Shooter allows you to choose between two sides of the law. Play as Enforcer or Criminal, customize your gear for the task at hand and hit the streets and play how you want in a city filled with more action this side of a Hollywood blockbuster.

tc.name: APB Reloaded
tc.short_description: The world’s first and premier Action MMO Third Person Shooter allows you to choose between two sides of the law. Play as Enforcer or Criminal, customize your gear for the task at hand and hit the streets and play how you want in a city filled with more action this side of a Hollywood blockbuster.

en.name: F1® 2021
en.short_description: Every story has a beginning in F1® 2021, the official videogame of the 2021 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™. Enjoy the stunning new features of F1® 2021, including the thrilling story experience ‘Braking Point’, two-player Career, and get even closer to the grid with ‘Real-Season Start’.

tc.name: F1® 2021
tc.short_description: 《F1® 2021》是 2021 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™ 的官方遊戲，在這裡，每則故事都有其來歷。享受《F1® 2021》的精彩新功能，包括「急煞點」的刺激劇情體驗、雙玩家生涯模式，並以「真實賽季起步」取得更好的排位。

en.name: Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Gather your party and get ready for the kick-ass new version of GameSpot's PC Game of the Year 2014. With hours of new content, new game modes, full voiceovers, split-screen multiplayer, and thousands of improvements, there's never been a better time to explore the epic world of Rivellon!

tc.name: Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Gather your party and get ready for the kick-ass new version of GameSpot's PC Game of the Year 2014. With hours of new content, new game modes, full voiceovers, split-screen multiplayer, and thousands of improvements, there's never been a better time to explore the epic world of Rivellon!

en.name: RUINER
en.short_description: RUINER is a brutal action shooter set in the year 2091 in the cyber metropolis Rengkok. A wired psychopath lashes out against a corrupt system to uncover the truth and retrieve his kidnapped brother under the guidance of a secretive hacker friend.

tc.name: RUINER
tc.short_description: RUINER 是一款刺激的動作射擊遊戲,故事發生於 2091 年嶺谷市,一位配有生化裝置的狂徒為拯救被綁的兄長,接受了神秘駭客的幫助,攻擊腐敗的體制並揭發背後的真相。 在墮落的暗巷中體驗,瓦解「天堂」背後主宰虛擬世界的企業巨頭。 結合超極限的反應速度、強化工具及武器來達成任務。

en.name: Sonic Adventure 2
en.short_description: Experience two unique adventures featuring both long-time heroes and new and returning villains as they battle for the fate of the world!

tc.name: Sonic Adventure 2
tc.short_description: Experience two unique adventures featuring both long-time heroes and new and returning villains as they battle for the fate of the world!

en.name: For The King II
en.short_description: Battle against Fahrul's tyrannical Queen alone or as a party of four players in the sequel to For The King, the massively popular turn-based roguelite tabletop RPG. Will you unravel the once beloved Queen's terrible secret?

tc.name: 為了吾王 II / For the King II
tc.short_description: 《為了吾王》是結合桌遊與 Roguelike 元素的熱門回合制角色扮演遊戲。在這款續作中，你將獨自對抗專橫的法汝女王，或是組成四人小隊展開冒險。對於曾經備受愛戴的女王，你能夠揭開她的可怕秘密嗎？

en.name: EVERSPACE™
en.short_description: EVERSPACE™ combines fast-paced combat with roguelike elements, great visuals and a captivating story. It takes you on a challenging journey through an ever-changing, beautifully crafted universe full of surprises. Shoot, craft and loot your way to victory while the odds are stacked against you.

tc.name: EVERSPACE™
tc.short_description: 《EVERSPACE™》結合快節奏戰鬥、Roguelike 類型元素、華麗視覺效果與扣人心弦的劇情。遊戲將帶你踏上充滿挑戰的旅程，穿越變化無窮、驚喜不斷的美麗宇宙。一路射擊強敵、製作武器、劫掠資源，在極其不利的條件下奮力奪得勝利。

en.name: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne
en.short_description: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne is a violent, film-noir love story. Dark, tragic and intense, the in-depth story is a thrill-ride of shocking twists and revelations. Love hurts.

tc.name: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne
tc.short_description: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne 是一篇兼具暴力美學和寫實風格的愛情故事。遊戲充斥著陰暗、悲劇和緊湊的情節，其故事劇情就像搭乘雲霄飛車一樣轉折跌宕、處處驚奇，而愛可以成傷。

en.name: Scorn
en.short_description: Scorn is an atmospheric first-person horror adventure game set in a nightmarish universe of odd forms and somber tapestry.

tc.name: Scorn
tc.short_description: 《Scorn》是款氛圍獨特的第一人稱恐怖冒險遊戲，故事發生在由詭異形體和陰闇聚合所組成的噩夢宇宙中。

en.name: Solasta: Crown of the Magister
en.short_description: Roll for initiative, take attacks of opportunity, manage player location and the verticality of the battle field in this Turn-Based Tactical RPG based on the SRD 5.1 Ruleset. In Solasta, you make the choices, dice decide your destiny.

tc.name: Solasta: Crown of the Magister
tc.short_description: Roll for initiative, take attacks of opportunity, manage player location and the verticality of the battle field in this Turn-Based Tactical RPG based on the SRD 5.1 Ruleset. In Solasta, you make the choices, dice decide your destiny.

en.name: Mutant Year Zero: Road to Eden
en.short_description: A tactical game combining the turn-based combat of XCOM with story, exploration, stealth, and strategy. Take control of a team of Mutants navigating a post-human Earth. Created by a team including former HITMAN leads and the designer of PAYDAY.

tc.name: Mutant Year Zero: Road to Eden
tc.short_description: A tactical game combining the turn-based combat of XCOM with story, exploration, stealth, and strategy. Take control of a team of Mutants navigating a post-human Earth. Created by a team including former HITMAN leads and the designer of PAYDAY.

en.name: BlazBlue Entropy Effect
en.short_description: Enjoy action-packed flashy combat with incredibly satisfying combos and responsive controls! Numerous characters, each with completely unique playstyles and loads of unlockable moves & upgrades! This action roguelike sets the bar for fluid fast-paced action.

tc.name: 蒼翼：混沌效應
tc.short_description: 超華麗痛快戰鬥，極致爽快連招！ 超多角色、超百種招式！這款獨樹一格的動作Rogue遊戲將帶給你酣暢淋漓的超預期體驗。

en.name: Monster Sanctuary
en.short_description: Monster taming meets metroidvania. Collect, train and battle monsters in a lovely side-scroller pixel world.

tc.name: Monster Sanctuary
tc.short_description: 怪物收服和類銀河戰士惡魔城風格合為一體。在可愛的橫向像素世界中收集怪物、訓練並戰鬥。

en.name: DEATHLOOP
en.short_description: DEATHLOOP is a next-gen FPS from Arkane Lyon, the award-winning studio behind Dishonored. In DEATHLOOP, two rival assassins are trapped in a mysterious timeloop on the island of Blackreef, doomed to repeat the same day for eternity.

tc.name: DEATHLOOP
tc.short_description: DEATHLOOP為次世代第一人稱射擊遊戲，由一手打造《Dishonored》系列榮獲大獎肯定的Arkane Studios里昂工作室推出。DEATHLOOP裡，兩名勢不兩立的殺手被困在黑礁島上神祕的時間循環中，註定永遠都要重複過著同一天。

en.name: Dead Rising 3 Apocalypse Edition
en.short_description: Explore the zombie-infested city of Los Perdidos, and find a way to escape before a military strike wipes the entire city, and everyone in it, off the map.

tc.name: Dead Rising 3 Apocalypse Edition
tc.short_description: 探索被喪屍病毒感染的Los Perdidos城，並在軍方介入突擊並掃平整個城市之前，連同所有生還者尋找逃出之路。

en.name: Myth of Empires
en.short_description: Myth of Empires is a multiplayer war sandbox game featuring a high degree of freedom and multiple civilizations. Players must survive, craft, create, and lead troops in their quest to conquer PVE or PVP territory and build their own empire. Xizhou Civilization Pack is now officially released!

tc.name: 帝國神話
tc.short_description: 《帝國神話》是一款以高自由度玩法為核心的冷兵器戰爭沙盒網遊。玩家將置身於一個多文明的世界，在這裡您將可以體驗生存、建設、經營和創造等豐富玩法，另外玩家可以在宏大的PVE或PVP世界中，引領部族攻城掠地，最終鑄就獨屬於自己的帝國！ 《帝國神話》西域文明組合包現已正式發布！

en.name: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 5
en.short_description: Stand and fight for humanity. This arcade shooter takes place in the year 2022, as the Earth Defense Force fends off an all-out attack by unknown life forms. Become an EDF soldier, battle against endless hordes of immense enemies, and restore peace to the earth.

tc.name: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE 5
tc.short_description: 人類啊，對抗命運吧！ 本款遊戲是描寫人類在西元2022年，面對突如其來侵襲地球的外星生命體，賭上「全地球防衛機構」EDF的性命與之戰鬥的動作射擊遊戲。 玩家將化身EDF的士兵，一一殲滅來勢洶洶無以計數的巨大敵人，守護地球的和平。

en.name: JUMP FORCE
en.short_description: Create your own avatar to fight alongside the most powerful Manga heroes in an original Story Mode, or head to the Online Lobby to challenge other players and discover lots of modes and activities.

tc.name: JUMP FORCE
tc.short_description: 創造屬於你的虛擬化身，在遊戲原創劇情模式中與最強大的漫畫英雄並肩作戰，或是前去連線大廳挑戰其他玩家，並且發掘各種玩法。

en.name: Soccer Online: Ball 3D
en.short_description: Multiplayer soccer simulator. Control one player. Play online or with bots.

tc.name: 足球在線：球3D
tc.short_description: 多人足球模擬器。操控一名球員。線上遊玩或與機器人對戰。

en.name: Tropico 6
en.short_description: El Presidente is back! Prove yourself once again as a feared dictator or peace-loving statesman on the island state of Tropico and shape the fate of your very own banana republic through four distinctive eras.

tc.name: Tropico 6
tc.short_description: 總統先生回來啦！政治動盪與社會動亂的時代，人民在呼喚有遠見的領導人， 一位能以遠見和智慧掌控國家命運的領袖。

en.name: Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut
en.short_description: You play Adam Jensen, an ex-SWAT specialist who's been handpicked to oversee the defensive needs of one of America's most experimental biotechnology firms. Your job is to safeguard company secrets, but when a black ops team breaks in and kills the very scientists you were hired to protect, everything you thought you knew about your job...

tc.name: Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut
tc.short_description: You play Adam Jensen, an ex-SWAT specialist who's been handpicked to oversee the defensive needs of one of America's most experimental biotechnology firms. Your job is to safeguard company secrets, but when a black ops team breaks in and kills the very scientists you were hired to protect, everything you thought you knew about your job...

en.name: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance
en.short_description: The last days of man are at hand.. Two years after the Infinite War the once great warring nations now lie in ruins, and humanity’s hope for a brighter future is nothing but a bitter memory. A new, seemingly unstoppable enemy, supported by the zealots of The Order, now seeks to eradicate mankind: UEF, Aeon Loyalist, and Cybran alike.

tc.name: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance
tc.short_description: The last days of man are at hand.. Two years after the Infinite War the once great warring nations now lie in ruins, and humanity’s hope for a brighter future is nothing but a bitter memory. A new, seemingly unstoppable enemy, supported by the zealots of The Order, now seeks to eradicate mankind: UEF, Aeon Loyalist, and Cybran alike.

en.name: Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League
en.short_description: From the creators of Batman: Arkham, Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League is a genre-defying third-person action shooter where the ultimate band of misfits must do the impossible: Kill the Justice League.

tc.name: 自殺突擊隊：戰勝正義聯盟
tc.short_description: 由《蝙蝠俠：阿卡漢》創作者所打造的《自殺突擊隊：戰勝正義聯盟》是一款顛覆類型的第三人稱動作射擊遊戲。一個極度格格不入的組合必須完成不可能的任務：戰勝正義聯盟。

en.name: Sherlock Holmes: The Devil's Daughter
en.short_description: Experience a fantastic adventure with unique gameplay that blends investigation, action and exploration in a breath-taking thriller that will test the limits of your nerves and intelligence. Play as the great detective and track down evil in the darkest corners of London and the human soul…

tc.name: Sherlock Holmes: The Devil's Daughter
tc.short_description: 成爲有史以來最著名的偵探：夏洛克•福爾摩斯！利用你們驚人的偵探才華破解五個令人毛骨悚然的不同罪案：謀殺、尋人、驚天盜竊，調查有時會把你們引入光怪陸離的世界。

en.name: Half-Life: Blue Shift
en.short_description: Made by Gearbox Software and originally released in 2001 as an add-on to Half-Life, Blue Shift is a return to the Black Mesa Research Facility in which you play as Barney Calhoun, the security guard sidekick who helped Gordon out of so many sticky situations.

tc.name: Half-Life: Blue Shift
tc.short_description: 由 Gearbox Software 製作，《關鍵時刻》(Blue Shift) 是於 2001 年所發行的《戰慄時空》的模組，讓您回到黑色高地研究設施並扮演警衛巴尼的身分，協助陷入窘境的高登解決難題。

en.name: Viscera Cleanup Detail
en.short_description: In Viscera Cleanup Detail, you step into the boots of a space-station janitor tasked with cleaning up after various horrific sci-fi horror events. Instead of machineguns and plasma-rifles, your tools are a mop and bucket. That hero left a mess, and it's up to you to deal with the aftermath.

tc.name: Viscera Cleanup Detail
tc.short_description: In Viscera Cleanup Detail, you step into the boots of a space-station janitor tasked with cleaning up after various horrific sci-fi horror events. Instead of machineguns and plasma-rifles, your tools are a mop and bucket. That hero left a mess, and it's up to you to deal with the aftermath.

en.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 3 (2011)
en.short_description: The best-selling first-person action series of all-time returns with an epic sequel to the multiple GOTY award winner Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 2

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 3 (2011)
tc.short_description: The best-selling first-person action series of all-time returns with an epic sequel to the multiple GOTY award winner Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 2

en.name: Poly Bridge
en.short_description: Unleash your engineering creativity with an engaging and fresh bridge-building simulator with all the bells and whistles. Enjoy hours of physics-based puzzle solving in the Campaign and then jump in the Sandbox to create your own bridge designs and puzzles!

tc.name: Poly Bridge
tc.short_description: Unleash your engineering creativity with an engaging and fresh bridge-building simulator with all the bells and whistles. Enjoy hours of physics-based puzzle solving in the Campaign and then jump in the Sandbox to create your own bridge designs and puzzles!

en.name: Bellwright
en.short_description: Establish and expand your own settlements, liberate the land and assist its villagers, and recruit others to your cause while learning more about a life you had to leave behind. Command your forces, prove your valor through combat, and cement yourself as the hero of your people.

tc.name: Bellwright
tc.short_description: 建立並擴展屬於您自己的領土，解放村落，幫助村民，並招募其他人加入您的事業。了解關於你的背景故事並同時了解更多您不得不放棄的過去。指揮您的部隊，通過戰鬥証明您的勇氣，並鞏固您作爲人民英雄的地位。

en.name: Prototype™
en.short_description: You are the Prototype, Alex Mercer, a man without memory armed with amazing shape-shifting abilities, hunting your way to the heart of the conspiracy which created you; making those responsible pay. Fast & Deadly Shape-Shifting Combat: Reconfigure your body to the situation at hand.

tc.name: Prototype™
tc.short_description: 你就是原型兵器：Alex Mercer，一個失去記憶、但卻擁有驚人變形能力的男子，正深入探求自己被創造出來的身世之謎，誓言要讓這些幕後兇手付出代價。快速且致命的變形戰鬥： 你的軀體可依據處境而恣意變形，從爪子、利刃、大錘到鞭子，選擇適當的武器來因應各種情勢。也可以變形成為盾牌或盔甲進行防禦，或使用進階感應能力（熱感應視覺及感染探測視覺）來追蹤你的敵人。誇張的靈活移動： 流暢的穿梭建築與建築間、在牆壁上急奔、或是跳躍於車輛與任何障礙物之上，適應環境的跑酷能力將使你在紐約市的開放世界隨心所欲的移動。獨特的偽裝能力： 任何時間你只要解決敵人，便能偽裝他們的外貌並獲得他們的記憶與能力。

en.name: 100% Orange Juice
en.short_description: 100% Orange Juice is a digital multiplayer board game populated by developer Orange Juice's all-star cast. Characters from Flying Red Barrel, QP Shooting, Suguri and Sora come together with all-new characters to duke it out... with dice.

tc.name: 100% Orange Juice
tc.short_description: 100%鮮橙汁是橙汁系列作品全明星登場的桌面遊戲。與來自各個橙汁作品裡的角色，以及在本作中出現的新角色們，一起以獲勝為目標使用骰子對戰吧！

en.name: Kingdoms and Castles
en.short_description: Kingdoms and Castles is a city-building simulation game about growing a kingdom from a tiny hamlet to a sprawling city and imposing castle. Make trade agreements, alliance, and war with neighboring AI controlled kingdoms. Each villager and resource is individually simulated.

tc.name: Kingdoms and Castles
tc.short_description: 國王與城堡是一款王國發展遊戲，將一個小村莊擴展成宏偉國度的豐功偉業。

en.name: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
en.short_description: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove is the complete Shovel Knight collection, containing all 5 games in the epic saga! Dig, blast, slash, and bash your way through a fantastical, 8-bit inspired world of pixel-perfect platforming, memorable characters, and world-class action-adventure gameplay.

tc.name: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
tc.short_description: 鏟子騎士：無盡寶藏包含鏟子騎士系列全5作！這是一個世界級的冒險遊戲，在懷舊的人物和像素畫面中挖、炸、砍、劈，開闢出你自己的奇異道路！

en.name: Transport Fever 2
en.short_description: The classic transport simulation genre has a new gold standard with Transport Fever 2. Discover a whole new world by navigating transport routes through land, water and air. May progress and prosperity find their way!

tc.name: Transport Fever 2
tc.short_description: 經典的運輸模擬類遊戲 Transport Fever 2 有了新的黃金標準。駕駛於陸、海、空運輸路線來探索全新的世界。願進步與繁榮能找到出路！

en.name: Command & Conquer™ Red Alert™ 3
en.short_description: The desperate leadership of a doomed Soviet Union travels back in time to change history and restore the glory of Mother Russia.

tc.name: 《終極動員令：紅色警戒 3》
tc.short_description: 註定要滅亡的蘇聯絕望領導人回到過去，試圖改變歷史，恢復母親俄羅斯的榮耀。

en.name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim VR
en.short_description: A true, full-length open-world game for VR has arrived from Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim VR reimagines the complete epic fantasy masterpiece with an unparalleled sense of scale, depth, and immersion. Skyrim VR also includes all official add-ons.

tc.name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim VR
tc.short_description: Bethesda Game Studios將為VR玩家帶來真正的完整開放世界遊戲。《Skyrim VR》重新打造這款史詩級奇幻鉅作，將遊戲的規模、深度和玩家的身歷其境感全部推向前所未有的境界。從征服古代龍族到深入崎嶇山稜的探險之旅，玩家可以隨喜好選擇，以各種方式體驗《Skyrim VR》栩栩如生的開放世界。《Skyrim VR》也包含所有官方追加內容。

en.name: Garten of Banban
en.short_description: Enter Banban's Kindergarten, and you're sure to make some friends. Explore the mysterious establishment and don't lose your life and sanity. Uncover the horrifying truth behind the place, but be careful, as you are far from alone…

tc.name: Garten of Banban
tc.short_description: Enter Banban's Kindergarten, and you're sure to make some friends. Explore the mysterious establishment and don't lose your life and sanity. Uncover the horrifying truth behind the place, but be careful, as you are far from alone…

en.name: KARDS - The WW2 Card Game
en.short_description: KARDS, The World War II Card Game, combines traditional CCG gameplay with innovative mechanics inspired by classic strategy games and real battlefield tactics. Take command and challenge other players in grand-scale warfare on the ground, air, or seas.

tc.name: KARDS - 二戰卡牌遊戲
tc.short_description: KARDS，二戰題材卡牌類遊戲，將傳統的收集類卡牌遊戲的遊戲方式與真實的戰場策略和受傳統戰略遊戲啟發產生的創新機制完美結合。運籌帷幄，與其他玩家在海、陸、空的大型戰場上一較高下。

en.name: SCARLET NEXUS
en.short_description: Choose between Yuito and Kasane, elite psionics each armed with a talent in psychokinesis and their own reason to fight. Complete both of their stories to unlock all the mysteries of a Brain Punk future caught between technology and psychic abilities.

tc.name: 緋紅結繫
tc.short_description: 此為以腦部與科技蓬勃發展的世界為舞台，可以置身體驗運用自身「念力」與夥伴們的形形色色力量戰鬥的超腦力動作，以及採用雙主角視角描寫的扎實故事劇情的「超腦力動作RPG」

en.name: Unpacking
en.short_description: Unpacking is a zen puzzle game about the familiar experience of pulling possessions out of boxes and fitting them into a new home. Part block-fitting puzzle, part home decoration, you are invited to create a satisfying living space while learning clues about the life you’re unpacking.

tc.name: Unpacking
tc.short_description: 《Unpacking》是一款體驗在日常生活情境下將物品從箱中取出，並擺放至新家的禪派益智遊戲。方塊益智解謎與家居裝潢要素兼具的本作中，你受邀打造一個舒適滿意的居住空間，同時探索即將在此處展開的生活樣貌。

en.name: Construction Simulator
en.short_description: Construction Simulator has returned – larger and more impressive than ever! Fulfil your ambition to become a successful construction entrepreneur by establishing your business from scratch, assisted by your mentor Hape.

tc.name: 《模擬建設》
tc.short_description: 《Construction Simulator》重磅回歸，這次規模更大、精彩程度更勝以往！在導師 Hape 的協助下，從零開始打造自己的事業，實現成為成功營建企業家的野心。解決各種大大小小有趣的計畫，滿足客戶要求，藉此累積收入，為載具陣容添購更強大的機具。

en.name: BLEACH Brave Souls
en.short_description: The world of mega-hit manga and anime BLEACH comes to Steam in this exciting 3D action game! Build a team using your favorite characters from the BLEACH universe!

tc.name: BLEACH Brave Souls - 3D動作
tc.short_description: 由熱銷漫畫和動畫《BLEACH 死神》為基礎3D動作類RPG在Steam登場！用喜歡的角色來組成最強的隊伍吧！

en.name: Yes, Your Grace
en.short_description: These are troubling times, Your Grace. The petitioners’ petty matters exceed our limited resources, to say nothing of the war. A careful balance must be struck. Your throne awaits.

tc.name: Yes, Your Grace
tc.short_description: These are troubling times, Your Grace. The petitioners’ petty matters exceed our limited resources, to say nothing of the war. A careful balance must be struck. Your throne awaits.

en.name: Super Animal Royale
en.short_description: Welcome to the coziest way to kill your friends. Super Animal Royale is a 64-player, top-down 2D battle royale where adorably murderous animals fight tooth, claw, and machine gun. Then, relax in Super Animal World with fishing, hamsterball races, and story quests before the next fight to the death.

tc.name: Super Animal Royale
tc.short_description: 歡迎體驗最輕鬆地幹掉朋友的遊戲！《超級動物大逃殺》是一款 64 人在線的上帝視角 2D 大逃殺遊戲，遊戲中可愛又兇猛的動物們將激烈的張牙舞爪，用機槍掃射四周。戰鬥結束後，你還可以前往超級動物世界放鬆身心，體驗釣魚、倉鼠球競賽，完成劇情委託，等待下一場生死決斗的到來。

en.name: DOOM 3
en.short_description: A demonic invasion has overwhelmed the Union Aerospace Corporation's Mars research facility. As one of only a few survivors, you must fight your way to hell and back against a horde of demons in this award-winning horror/action FPS and reimagining of the original DOOM.

tc.name: DOOM 3
tc.short_description: 地獄大軍大舉入侵，聯合航太公司的火星研究中心慘遭蹂躪。你是少數倖存者之一，必須殺入地獄屠盡惡魔大軍，然後活著回來。快來體驗這款備受讚譽的恐怖動作第一人稱射擊遊戲，看看初代《DOOM》獲得怎樣的重新詮釋。

en.name: Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth
en.short_description: Two larger-than-life heroes, Ichiban Kasuga and Kazuma Kiryu are brought together by the hand of fate, or perhaps something more sinister… Live it up in Japan and explore all that Hawaii has to offer in an RPG adventure so big it spans the Pacific.

tc.name: 人中之龍８
tc.short_description: 再次由「谷底」鹹魚翻身的男人──春日一番，以及面對「人生最後階段」之戰的男人──桐生一馬。 採用雙主角推展故事劇情，堪稱系列最高峰戲劇效果的超大作RPG。 戰鬥進化為更具戰略性的「新動態指令RPG戰鬥」。 故事背景則是系列首次的海外舞台「夏威夷」，請盡情遊玩夏威夷特有的各種娛樂場所！

en.name: Dead Island: Riptide Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – more beautiful than ever. Caught in an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

tc.name: Dead Island: Riptide Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – more beautiful than ever. Caught in an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

en.name: CastleMiner Z
en.short_description: CastleMiner Z is an infinite world filled with deep places to explore, and horrifying monsters to slay. Build structures out of blocks, craft weapons and tools from raw materials, and explore the vast and frightening world around you.

tc.name: CastleMiner Z
tc.short_description: CastleMiner Z is an infinite world filled with deep places to explore, and horrifying monsters to slay. Build structures out of blocks, craft weapons and tools from raw materials, and explore the vast and frightening world around you.

en.name: RISK: Global Domination
en.short_description: Take over the world in RISK: Global Domination, the iconic strategy board game with 100+ original and classic maps and millions of players

tc.name: RISK: Global Domination
tc.short_description: Take over the world in RISK: Global Domination, the iconic strategy board game with 100+ original and classic maps and millions of players

en.name: Absolver
en.short_description: Absolver is an online multiplayer combat game where players are placed behind the mask of a Prospect under control of the Guides, the new rulers of the fallen Adal Empire, who will determine your worth in joining their elite corps of Absolvers.

tc.name: Absolver
tc.short_description: 你從失落的Adal帝國廢墟里醒來，臉上戴著神秘詭異的面具，腦海中依稀殘存著神秘儀式的零碎片段。

en.name: POSTAL 4: No Regerts
en.short_description: POSTAL 4: No Regerts is a satirical and outrageous comedic open world first person shooter and the long-awaited true sequel to what’s been fondly dubbed as "The Worst Game Ever™", POSTAL 2!

tc.name: POSTAL 4: No Regerts
tc.short_description: POSTAL 4: No Regerts is a satirical and outrageous comedic open world first person shooter and the long-awaited true sequel to what’s been fondly dubbed as "The Worst Game Ever™", POSTAL 2!

en.name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
en.short_description: Half-Life® 2: Episode Two is the second in a trilogy of new games created by Valve that extends the award-winning and best-selling Half-Life® adventure. As Dr. Gordon Freeman, you were last seen exiting City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel erupted amidst a storm of unknown proportions.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
tc.short_description: Half-Life® 2: Episode Two 是 Valve 所推出的新三部曲遊戲中的第二部，延續獲獎又暢銷的 Half-Life® 冒險遊戲。 身為 高登費里曼博士，當城塔出現不明風暴時，你最後被目擊到與艾莉克絲凡斯離開第 17 號城。在 Episode Two 之中，您必須與合成人戰鬥並比賽穿越白森林，將從城塔中偷出的重要資訊包裹送到反抗勢力的科學家手上。 Episode Two 延續了獲獎的 Half-Life 中有獨特武器、車輛及新生物種的遊戲風格。

en.name: Paunch
en.short_description: One-on-one physical online duels.

tc.name: Paunch
tc.short_description: One-on-one physical online duels.

en.name: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
en.short_description: The year is 3015. The battlefields are dominated by war machines known as BattleMechs. Level entire cities and decimate the enemy in your BattleMech. Follow a quest for glory and revenge. Manage an expanding mercenary company. Fight alongside your friends with a four-player PvE co-op.

tc.name: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
tc.short_description: The year is 3015. The battlefields are dominated by war machines known as BattleMechs. Level entire cities and decimate the enemy in your BattleMech. Follow a quest for glory and revenge. Manage an expanding mercenary company. Fight alongside your friends with a four-player PvE co-op.

en.name: Call of Duty® 2
en.short_description: Call of Duty® 2 redefines the cinematic intensity and chaos of battle as seen through the eyes of ordinary soldiers fighting together in epic WWII conflicts. The sequel to 2003's Call of Duty, winner of over 80 Game of the Year awards, Call of Duty 2 offers more immense, more intense, more realistic battles than ever before, thanks to...

tc.name: Call of Duty® 2
tc.short_description: Call of Duty® 2 重新定義了一般士兵於二次世界大戰所見到的戰場，不但更有戲劇張力，戰場也更混亂。 繼 2003 年推出的 Call of Duty 勇奪逾 80 項年度最佳遊戲獎，現在 Call of Duty 2 採用 COD™2 引擎，帶來比以往都更寬廣的戰場，更有張力，更逼真的戰鬥。 二次世界大戰最佳開發團隊再次帶來全新驚人體驗：獲獎作品 Call of Duty 的開發團隊 Inifinity Ward 所開發。 前所未見的全新增強效果，從驚人的逼真繪圖到完美無縫的遊戲內容，革新的 COD2 引擎帶來突破性的 AI 與多選擇導向遊戲創新。 精緻繪製的飄雪、雨水、濃霧和硝煙，配合動態光影，讓這款遊戲成為至今最具張力的二次世界大戰射擊遊戲。

en.name: Move or Die
en.short_description: Move or Die is an absurdly fast-paced 4-player local and online party game where the mechanics change every 20 seconds! It's THE friendship-ruining game.

tc.name: Move or Die
tc.short_description: Move or Die是一款快節奏的4人單機和多人在線網絡遊戲，遊戲玩法每20秒變換一次。這絕對是一款讓友誼的小船說翻就翻的遊戲。

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky – standalone prequel for the acclaimed S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl, which tells you story about the Clear Sky group, that want to research the Zone and understand it better.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
tc.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky – standalone prequel for the acclaimed S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl, which tells you story about the Clear Sky group, that want to research the Zone and understand it better.

en.name: Total War: NAPOLEON – Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: NAPOLEON, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release

tc.name: Total War: NAPOLEON – Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: NAPOLEON, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release

en.name: Tricolour Lovestory
en.short_description: Time flies and never comes back. But with an incredible 1-million-word script and 100+ original CGs, this game will take you back to when you were young, simple and pure. Go and get the love of your life back, start something new, or end everything in flame, that's for you to decide!

tc.name: Tricolour Lovestory
tc.short_description: 時光一逝永不回，往事只能回味。 100萬字劇本+全程語音+100張CG的這部高中題材戀愛遊戲彷彿帶你回到學生時代，再經歷一次高中戀愛生活。那一天，你失去了她；那一天，她和她同時向你伸出了雙手，你不再孤身一人。此後，你的每一個選擇決定了是在歡聲笑語中打出GG，還是在這裡完成了人生的遺憾！

en.name: Imperator: Rome
en.short_description: Dominate the classical Mediterranean in Imperator: Rome, a grand strategy game from Paradox Interactive. Navigate the dangerous waters of politics and diplomacy as you build up your provinces and conquer foreign lands. Now available with special content and the digital artbook.

tc.name: Imperator: Rome
tc.short_description: 在 Paradox Interactive 推出的大型戰略遊戲《Imperator: Rome》中主宰古典時代的地中海。在政治和外交紛亂的險惡水域中確立方向，同時建立起自己的行省並征服異地。本遊戲現已推出，並涵蓋特殊內容和數位美術設定集。

en.name: Bloons TD 5
en.short_description: Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. The Bloons are back in full HD glory and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon in the most popular tower defense series in history.

tc.name: Bloons TD 5
tc.short_description: Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. The Bloons are back in full HD glory and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon in the most popular tower defense series in history.

en.name: God of War Ragnarök
en.short_description: Kratos and Atreus embark on a mythic journey for answers before Ragnarök arrives – now on PC.

tc.name: God of War Ragnarök
tc.short_description: 諸神黃昏在即，克雷多斯和阿特柔斯必須踏上神話之旅尋找解答—現已登陸PC。

en.name: Spelunky 2
en.short_description: Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a roguelike classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family.

tc.name: Spelunky 2

en.name: Wall World
en.short_description: Explore the mysterious Wall World on your giant robospider: mine for valuable resources, upgrade your equipment to fight off hordes of monsters, and discover exotic biomes in-between attacks. Will you be able to survive and learn the secrets of the Wall World?

tc.name: 牆世界
tc.short_description: 騎乘巨大機械蜘蛛探索神秘世界之牆：挖掘珍貴資源、升級裝備以擊退大量怪物，以及在襲擊之間發掘異地生物群系。你能夠生還並揭開世界之牆的秘密嗎？

en.name: 20 Minutes Till Dawn
en.short_description: 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a survival roguelite where endless hordes of creatures lurk from the dark. Craft an array of overpowering builds and eradicate waves of Lovecraftian nightmares. Will you be able to survive the night?

tc.name: 黎明前20分鐘
tc.short_description: 快圍剿巢穴裡不斷增生的克魯甦魔物！升級武器，選擇你的專屬職業，策略組合，一把20分鐘的Roguelike體驗，直接射爆刷爆爽爆！ ！你還可以選擇10分鐘模式！

en.name: Assassin’s Creed® Brotherhood
en.short_description: It’s time to join the Brotherhood.

tc.name: Assassin’s Creed® Brotherhood
tc.short_description: It’s time to join the Brotherhood.

en.name: Trine 4: The Nightmare Prince
en.short_description: The best-selling Trine series returns to the magic of 2.5D! Join three iconic heroes as they set off on a quest through fantastical fairytale landscapes to save the world from the Nightmare Prince’s shadows.

tc.name: Trine 4: The Nightmare Prince
tc.short_description: The best-selling Trine series returns to the magic of 2.5D! Join three iconic heroes as they set off on a quest through fantastical fairytale landscapes to save the world from the Nightmare Prince’s shadows.

en.short_description: A 4X real-time strategy game from the developers of the critically acclaimed Northgard. Set in Frank Herbert’s groundbreaking Dune universe, you must lead your faction and battle for control and dominance over the harsh desert planet of Arrakis.

tc.short_description: A 4X real-time strategy game from the developers of the critically acclaimed Northgard. Set in Frank Herbert’s groundbreaking Dune universe, you must lead your faction and battle for control and dominance over the harsh desert planet of Arrakis.

en.name: Sakura Clicker
en.short_description: The latest entry in the Sakura series is more action-packed than ever before! Sakura Clickers is a fast-paced, exciting adventure, full of content, in which you defeat your foes with the power of your mouse!

en.short_description: Lead humanity’s greatest weapon, the Grey Knights, in this fast-paced turn-based tactical RPG. Root out and purge a galaxy-spanning plague in a cinematic, story-driven campaign, using the tactics and talents of your own personalised squad of Daemonhunters.

tc.name: 《Warhammer 40,000：混沌之門 - 惡魔獵人》

en.name: Men of War: Assault Squad 2
en.short_description: Men of War: Assault Squad 2 expands the real-time tactics series with new skirmish missions, massive multiplayer battles, enhanced visuals, improved AI, and full Direct Control. Command five factions across 65 maps, 250 vehicles, and 200 soldiers in one of the most detailed WWII RTS experiences.

Command five factions across 65 maps, 250 vehicles, and 200 soldiers in one of the most detailed WWII RTS experiences.

en.name: GUILTY GEAR Xrd REV 2
en.short_description: Astonishing 3D cell animations and overwhelming content volume, the next-generation fighting game "GUILTY GEAR Xrd REV 2" is now out on Steam! Total cast of 25 unique characters, and tons of game modes, get ready to ROCK!

tc.short_description: 擁有非凡的3D動畫畫質與充實的遊戲模式，新世代對戰格鬥遊戲“GUILTY GEAR Xrd REV 2”隆重登場！

en.name: In Silence
en.short_description: In Silence is a multiplayer horror game. One player takes on the role of the monster who has hypersensitive hearing abilities and is almost completely blind. The other players(2-6) play as survivors, trying to escape or hunting the monster.

tc.short_description: In Silence is a multiplayer horror game. One player takes on the role of the monster who has hypersensitive hearing abilities and is almost completely blind. The other players(2-6) play as survivors, trying to escape or hunting the monster.

en.name: NBA 2K19
en.short_description: NBA 2K celebrates 20 years of redefining what sports gaming can be. NBA 2K19 continues to push limits as it brings gaming one step closer to real-life basketball excitement and culture.

tc.name: NBA 2K19
tc.short_description: 替運動遊戲重下定義的《NBA 2K》即將踏入第20個年頭。一路走來，《NBA 2K》不僅提供最為出色的畫面與遊戲表現，也帶來各種創新的遊戲模式，以及足可亂真的開放世界「街區」。《NBA 2K19》將持續挑戰遊戲設計的極限，務求讓玩家獲得更接近現實的精彩籃球體驗與街頭文化。

en.name: Shakes and Fidget
en.short_description: Shakes & Fidget is a hilarious fantasy role-playing satire and at the same time, an award-winning RPG! Sounds crazy? With over 50 million enthusiastic players, it ranks among the most celebrated online role-playing games worldwide!

en.short_description: Discover a new breed of Action-RPG game powered by an enhanced version of the Source™ Engine by Valve. Set in the Might & Magic® universe, players will experience ferocious combat in a dark and immersive fantasy environment. Swords, Stealth, Sorcery. Choose your way to kill.

tc.name: Dark Messiah of Might & Magic
tc.short_description: 體驗全新種類的動作角色扮演遊戲，採用 Valve 的增強版 Source™ 引擎。 遊戲設於魔法門 (Might & Magic®) 的世界，玩家進入詭秘的奇幻世界，體驗激烈戰鬥，氣氛引人入勝。 刀劍、匿蹤、法術。 挑選您自己的必殺技。 尖端技術：體驗 Valve 增強版的 Source™ 引擎。 以奇幻設定為背景，發掘全新的視點，全面性的體感、逼真的動態，還有物理繪圖和完整的第一人稱對戰戰鬥系統。 步步緊湊的激戰：挑戰 12 個大型關卡的邪惡勢力，習得逾 30 種武器和各種高殺傷力的法術。 角色進化：拓展遊戲性而不受限於單一職業。 用「黑暗彌賽亞」(Dark Messiah) 的獨特技能演進系統，隨遊戲進行而習得強力的新法術和攻擊技能。

en.name: Into the Breach
en.short_description: Control powerful mechs from the future to defeat an alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game.

tc.name: Into the Breach
tc.short_description: 控制來自未來的強大機甲，擊敗外星威脅。在這款回合制戰略遊戲中，每一次拯救世界的嘗試，都是隨機生成的全新挑戰。

en.name: Day of Infamy
en.short_description: Experience close-quarters battles in iconic WWII settings. Defend the line, storm the beach, torch the enemy, or use a radio to call in fire support. Day of Infamy is a teamwork-oriented shooter that will keep you on your toes and coming back for more with its diverse game modes and authentic arsenal.

tc.name: Day of Infamy
tc.short_description: 通過 PVP 模式和合作戰鬥模式，體驗激烈的二戰第一人稱射擊戰鬥。扮演美國陸軍、英聯邦陸軍或德意志國防軍的歷史部隊，召喚火力支援，掩護目標，將戰線向前方推進。

en.name: Dragon Age: Origins
en.short_description: When history tells the story of the Fifth Blight, what will be said about the hero who turned the tide against the darkspawn? Determine your legacy and fight for Thedas as a noble dwarf, an elf far from home, a mage apprentice, or a customized hero of your own design.

tc.name: Dragon Age: Origins
tc.short_description: When history tells the story of the Fifth Blight, what will be said about the hero who turned the tide against the darkspawn? Determine your legacy and fight for Thedas as a noble dwarf, an elf far from home, a mage apprentice, or a customized hero of your own design.

en.short_description: SoulWorker, free-2-play anime action MMO, combines pacy combos with a real anime feel. You’ll need excellent reactions and precise timing to take it to the merciless creatures in this post-apocalyptic world.

en.short_description: Experience the intensity of head-to-head battles with Street Fighter® V! Choose from 16 iconic characters, then battle against friends online or offline with a robust variety of match options.

tc.name: Street Fighter V
tc.short_description: 在 Street Fighter® V 之中，您能體驗一對一單挑的快感！您可選擇 16 位擁有獨特故事與挑戰的戰士，利用各種可自訂之遊戲模式跟朋友在線上或面對面對戰。

en.name: Realm of the Mad God Exalt
en.short_description: Embark on an exhilarating journey into the pixelated Realm of the Mad God! Join, an action-packed, free-to-play MMO bullet hell game. Discover a world with danger, challenges, and hidden treasures as you battle through waves of enemies. Team up with players and conquer dungeons to become a legend!

Defend your idyllic island kingdom against a horde of Viking invaders, as you lead the desperate exodus of your people. Command your loyal subjects to take full tactical advantage of the unique shape of each island.

tc.name: Bad North: Jotunn Edition
tc.short_description: Bad North 是一款讓人着迷卻又殘暴的實時戰術 Roguelite 游戲。帶領您荒蕪島國裏生無可戀的子民抵抗維京入侵者。指揮您的臣民利用各島嶼的獨特地理優勢取得策略性優勢。一切都危在旦夕：失敗，就將眼睜睜看著你子民的血染紅土地。

en.name: SEGA Mega Drive and Genesis Classics
en.short_description: SEGA’s collection of Mega Drive & Genesis Classics comes to a new generation, now updated with even more features: online multiplayer, achievements, mirror mode, rewind, save states, VR and more! Over 50 classic games in one great package. Get into the classics!

tc.name: SEGA Mega Drive and Genesis Classics

en.short_description: Blow leaves, upgrade your gear, and automate your progress as you explore the Leaf Universe. A satisfying incremental idle game where every leaf blown brings you closer to the next big upgrade. Simple, relaxing, and endlessly rewarding. Let the leaves fall, and your progress rise!

en.short_description: Experience the winner of over 300 Game of the Year awards, now on PC. Discover Ellie and Abby’s story with graphical enhancements, gameplay modes like the roguelike survival experience No Return, and more.

tc.name: The Last of Us™ Part II Remastered
tc.short_description: 體驗這個榮獲超過300項年度最佳遊戲獎項肯定的作品，現已登陸PC。透過強化的圖形效果、Roguelike生存體驗「浴血無歸」等遊戲模式以及更多其他內容，探索艾莉和艾比的故事。

en.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
en.short_description: With its extensive Tour of Duty campaign, a near-limitless number of skirmish modes, updates and new content for Counter-Strike's award-winning multiplayer game play, plus over 12 bonus single player missions, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero is a tremendous offering of single and multiplayer content.

tc.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
tc.short_description: 《絕對武力：一觸即發》不但有精心製作的 Tour of Duty (使命召喚) 戰役、幾近無限變化的對抗模式、絕對武力多人連線遊戲的更新和新增內容，更有超過 12 個額外單機任務。不管是單人還是多人遊戲，都絕對不容錯過。

en.name: Portal Knights
en.short_description: The world of Elysia needs YOU! Join this cooperative, 3D sandbox action RPG to level up your character, craft epic weapons, conquer enemies in real-time, and build almost anything! Craft your adventure. Forge your hero. Become the ultimate Portal Knight!

tc.name: Portal Knights

en.short_description: Hardcore and realistic; LiF is a Medieval multiplayer sandbox RPG, with free terraforming, a rich crafting system and preset and modular building construction. With engaging survival aspects, no target physics-based combat and a unique formation system - along with numerous other features - LiF is not for the faint of heart!

en.short_description: Take to the skies in the World’s favourite flight simulator! The multi award winning Microsoft Flight Simulator X lands on Steam for the first time. Take off from anywhere in the world, flying some of the world’s most iconic aircraft to any one of 24,000 destinations.

en.short_description: Hitchhike your way to freedom in this crazy procedurally generated road trip. No one's road is the same!

tc.short_description: Off to the next round! Experience a new omnibus simulator with OMSI 2 and start discovering Spandau while driving the omnibus. OMSI 2 is the successor of the well-known and awarded omnibus simulator "OMSI - The Bus Simulator".

en.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 3
en.short_description: Patisserie "La Soleil", run by Kashou Minaduki, is flourishing thanks to the help of two catgirls: Maple, full of pride and a little on the haughty side, and Cinnamon, an impulsive daydreamer.

tc.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 3
tc.short_description: 水無月嘉祥所經營的蛋糕店『Soleil』裡的貓娘情人持續增加，今天也好評營業中。 自尊心很強、高傲又時髦的貓娘次女楓， 與總是陷入妄想獨自一人暴走的三女桂。 兩隻貓在姊妹之中的關係如同至交好友一般，因為一些契機而對夢想感到煩惱的楓， 想成為摯友的助力卻不知該怎麼做才好的桂，描繪一起朝著夢想成長的姊妹倆以及家人間的羈絆， 稍微有點Ｈ又溫暖人心的貓娘戀愛喜劇今天也開張囉！

en.name: Donut County
en.short_description: Donut County is a story-based physics puzzle game where you play as an ever-growing hole in the ground. Meet cute characters, steal their trash, and throw them in a hole.

tc.name: Donut County

Complete control over character's body, hundreds of game mods and bloody mess with full body dismemberment - you've never been able to annihilate your enemies like that before!

tc.name: Worms Armageddon
tc.short_description: 在這款備受喜愛的《Worms™ Armageddon》遊戲中，那些強悍的無脊椎動物要回來復仇了。一次全新的蟲蟲危機！您可以獨自或和親朋好友一起享受這個充滿笑料的有趣遊戲。

en.name: Soulmask
en.short_description: Don the Ancient Mask. Wield the power of gods. Possess any of your tribespeople, recruit followers, and build a thriving automated civilization. Survive, expand, and forge your own legacy across a vast ancient open world — together with friends.

tc.name: Soulmask
tc.short_description: 戴上遠古面甲，獲得神明之力，操控任意部落成員，招募族人並建立自動化部落，與朋友一起在龐大的古文明開放世界中生存、擴張並創造屬於你的文明。

tc.name: 机械战警：暴戾都市

tc.name: South Park™: The Fractured But Whole™

tc.name: Ryse: Son of Rome
tc.short_description: “Ryse: Son of Rome” tells the story of Marius Titus, a young Roman soldier who witnesses the murder of his family at the hands of barbarian bandits, then travels with the Roman army to Britannia to seek revenge.

en.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
en.short_description: Embark on a heartrending journey into a brutal, breathtaking world, and discover the cost of saving those you love in a desperate struggle for survival. Strike from the shadows or unleash hell with a variety of weapons, tools and unearthly powers.

tc.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
tc.short_description: 走進異象四起卻令人屏息的殘酷世界，踏上淒婉揪心的旅程。不惜代價求生、拯救自己所愛的人，感受其中的糾結與痛苦。利用各種兵器、工具和非同尋常的能力，暗中偷襲或發動駭人的攻勢。

en.name: ROUNDS
en.short_description: Rounds is a 1v1 rogue-lite shooter where each round gets more intense. The losing player of each round unlocks clever upgrades to create a better build to counter their opponent.

tc.name: ROUNDS
tc.short_description: Rounds is a 1v1 rogue-lite shooter where each round gets more intense. The losing player of each round unlocks clever upgrades to create a better build to counter their opponent.

en.name: DiRT Rally
en.short_description: DiRT Rally is the most authentic and thrilling rally game ever made, road-tested over 80 million miles by the DiRT community. It perfectly captures that white knuckle feeling of racing on the edge as you hurtle along dangerous roads, knowing that one crash could irreparably harm your stage time.

tc.name: DiRT Rally
tc.short_description: 《塵埃拉力賽（DiRT Rally）》是目前最具權威的一款拉力競速遊戲，塵埃社群實地測試已超過八千萬英里。其核心旨在賽道拉力過程中，傳達最真實和最激情的競速思想。此作完美地體現了拉力競速時，極度驚險的真實性。沿着险峻的道路疯狂飞驰，明知只要撞击一下就可能丧命，你是否还能保持镇定？

en.name: Fear Surrounds
en.short_description: Fear Surrounds is a horror-tinged take on the werewolf-style social subterfuge genre, where two evil spirits hide within a group of players and attempt to sabotage and murder them.

tc.name: 恐惧之间 Fear surrounds

en.short_description: Enjoy the original story of ONE PIECE from Fuschia Village to the mysterious kingdom of Dressrosa. Will your resolution be strong enough to defeat the most dangerous pirates, including Doflamingo and many more?

en.short_description: Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

en.name: 911 Operator
en.short_description: Game about the difficult work of people that manage emergency lines and services. Answer incoming calls and react properly - give first aid instructions, advise, dispatch correct number of firemen / police / ambulances, or sometimes - just ignore the call. Play on ANY CITY in the world!
